@package napkin
@version 0.3.8

module Napkin.Auth.GoogleEnvConfig

-- | default clientID and clientSecret, values were extracted from google
--   gcloud SDK. For detail, see:
--   <a>https://github.com/twistedpair/google-cloud-sdk/blob/master/google-cloud-sdk/lib/googlecloudsdk/core/config.py#L166-L167</a>
defaultClientId :: Text
defaultClientSecret :: Text

-- | the callback url must be registered. for detail, see:
--   <a>https://developers.google.com/youtube/v3/live/guides/auth/installed-apps</a>
napkinCallbackUrl :: Text

module Napkin.Auth.Types
data AuthEvalError
AuthError :: Text -> AuthEvalError
AuthToAuthorizedUser :: AuthEvalError -> AuthEvalError
UserProvidedAuthFileNotFound :: AuthEvalError -> AuthEvalError
NoNapkinGeneratedAuthFile :: AuthEvalError -> AuthEvalError
NoIDPDefaultAuthFile :: AuthEvalError -> AuthEvalError
AuthFileNotFound :: AuthEvalError -> AuthEvalError
NoClientInfo :: AuthEvalError -> AuthEvalError
AuthenticationFailed :: AuthEvalError -> AuthEvalError
ParseCredentialsError :: AuthEvalError -> AuthEvalError
NotSupported :: AuthEvalError -> AuthEvalError
GoogleAuthCodeError :: AuthEvalError -> AuthEvalError
type OAuth2ClientId = Text
type OAuth2ClientSecret = Text
type OAuth2Callback = Text
type NapkinOAuthClient = (OAuth2ClientId, OAuth2ClientSecret)

-- | Query Parameter Representation
data OAuth2
OAuth2 :: Text -> Text -> Text -> OAuth2
[_oAuth2ClientId] :: OAuth2 -> Text
[_oAuth2ClientSecret] :: OAuth2 -> Text
[_oAuth2Callback] :: OAuth2 -> Text
class HasCallback s a | s -> a
callback :: HasCallback s a => Lens' s a
class HasClientId s a | s -> a
clientId :: HasClientId s a => Lens' s a
class HasClientSecret s a | s -> a
clientSecret :: HasClientSecret s a => Lens' s a
newtype FromUser
FromUser :: FilePath -> FromUser
data ZeroCredentials
ZeroCredentials :: ZeroCredentials
data ResetNapkinCredentials
ResetNapkinCredentials :: ResetNapkinCredentials
data NapkinAuth a
[AuthWithUserFile] :: FilePath -> NapkinAuth FilePath
[AuthWithOAuthClient] :: NapkinOAuthClient -> NapkinAuth NapkinOAuthClient
[AuthWithZeroCredentials] :: ZeroCredentials -> NapkinAuth ZeroCredentials
[AuthResetCredentials] :: ResetNapkinCredentials -> NapkinAuth ResetNapkinCredentials
class ManySymbolVal (xs :: [Symbol])
manySymbolVal :: ManySymbolVal xs => proxy xs -> [String]
type CodeChallenge = Text
type CodeVerifier = Text
type OAuth2Code = Text
data CredentialFile
UserProvidedFile :: FilePath -> CredentialFile
NapkinGeneratedFile :: FilePath -> CredentialFile
IDPDefaultFile :: FilePath -> CredentialFile
NoAuthFile :: CredentialFile
type EncodingMethod = Text
type GrantType = Text
type URIQueryParams = [(ByteString, ByteString)]
type NetworkPort = Int

-- | OAuth2 and bigquery related scopes. for additional detail see:
--   <a>https://developers.google.com/identity/protocols/oauth2/scopes</a>
type GoogleEnv = Env BigQueryScopes
type BigQueryScopes = '["https://www.googleapis.com/auth/bigquery", "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform", "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform.read-only", "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/devstorage.full_control", "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/devstorage.read_only", "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/devstorage.read_write"]
authScopeType :: Proxy '["openid", "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/userinfo.email", "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform", "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/appengine.admin", "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/compute", "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/accounts.reauth"]
data OAuth2Conf
OAuth2Conf :: Text -> Text -> Text -> Proxy '["openid", "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/userinfo.email", "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform", "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/appengine.admin", "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/compute", "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/accounts.reauth"] -> URI -> Text -> EncodingMethod -> GrantType -> NetworkPort -> OAuth2Conf
[_oAuth2ConfOAuth2clientId] :: OAuth2Conf -> Text
[_oAuth2ConfOAuth2clientSecret] :: OAuth2Conf -> Text
[_oAuth2ConfOAuth2callback] :: OAuth2Conf -> Text
[_oAuth2ConfOAuth2scope] :: OAuth2Conf -> Proxy '["openid", "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/userinfo.email", "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform", "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/appengine.admin", "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/compute", "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/accounts.reauth"]
[_oAuth2ConfOAuth2requestUri] :: OAuth2Conf -> URI
[_oAuth2ConfOAuth2accessTokenRequestUri] :: OAuth2Conf -> Text
[_oAuth2ConfOAuth2encodingAlgorithm] :: OAuth2Conf -> EncodingMethod
[_oAuth2ConfOAuth2grantType] :: OAuth2Conf -> GrantType
[_oAuth2ConfOAuth2callbackPort] :: OAuth2Conf -> NetworkPort
class HasOAuth2accessTokenRequestUri s a | s -> a
oAuth2accessTokenRequestUri :: HasOAuth2accessTokenRequestUri s a => Lens' s a
class HasOAuth2callback s a | s -> a
oAuth2callback :: HasOAuth2callback s a => Lens' s a
class HasOAuth2callbackPort s a | s -> a
oAuth2callbackPort :: HasOAuth2callbackPort s a => Lens' s a
class HasOAuth2clientId s a | s -> a
oAuth2clientId :: HasOAuth2clientId s a => Lens' s a
class HasOAuth2clientSecret s a | s -> a
oAuth2clientSecret :: HasOAuth2clientSecret s a => Lens' s a
class HasOAuth2encodingAlgorithm s a | s -> a
oAuth2encodingAlgorithm :: HasOAuth2encodingAlgorithm s a => Lens' s a
class HasOAuth2grantType s a | s -> a
oAuth2grantType :: HasOAuth2grantType s a => Lens' s a
class HasOAuth2requestUri s a | s -> a
oAuth2requestUri :: HasOAuth2requestUri s a => Lens' s a
class HasOAuth2scope s a | s -> a
oAuth2scope :: HasOAuth2scope s a => Lens' s a
data OAuth2RunTime
OAuth2RunTime :: ByteString -> ByteString -> FilePath -> FilePath -> OAuth2RunTime
[_oAuth2RunTimeOAuth2codeVerifier] :: OAuth2RunTime -> ByteString
[_oAuth2RunTimeOAuth2codeChallenge] :: OAuth2RunTime -> ByteString
[_oAuth2RunTimeOAuth2credentialFile] :: OAuth2RunTime -> FilePath
[_oAuth2RunTimeOAuth2tmpCredentialFile] :: OAuth2RunTime -> FilePath
class HasOAuth2codeChallenge s a | s -> a
oAuth2codeChallenge :: HasOAuth2codeChallenge s a => Lens' s a
class HasOAuth2codeVerifier s a | s -> a
oAuth2codeVerifier :: HasOAuth2codeVerifier s a => Lens' s a
class HasOAuth2credentialFile s a | s -> a
oAuth2credentialFile :: HasOAuth2credentialFile s a => Lens' s a
class HasOAuth2tmpCredentialFile s a | s -> a
oAuth2tmpCredentialFile :: HasOAuth2tmpCredentialFile s a => Lens' s a
data OAuth2Token
OAuth2Token :: Text -> Int -> Text -> Text -> Text -> Text -> OAuth2Token
[_oAuth2TokenAccessToken] :: OAuth2Token -> Text
[_oAuth2TokenExpiresIn] :: OAuth2Token -> Int
[_oAuth2TokenRefreshToken] :: OAuth2Token -> Text
[_oAuth2TokenScope] :: OAuth2Token -> Text
[_oAuth2TokenTokenType] :: OAuth2Token -> Text
[_oAuth2TokenIdToken] :: OAuth2Token -> Text
class HasAccessToken s a | s -> a
accessToken :: HasAccessToken s a => Lens' s a
class HasExpiresIn s a | s -> a
expiresIn :: HasExpiresIn s a => Lens' s a
class HasIdToken s a | s -> a
idToken :: HasIdToken s a => Lens' s a
class HasRefreshToken s a | s -> a
refreshToken :: HasRefreshToken s a => Lens' s a
class HasScope s a | s -> a
scope :: HasScope s a => Lens' s a
class HasTokenType s a | s -> a
tokenType :: HasTokenType s a => Lens' s a
type O2CodeXchngStore = MVar (Either AuthEvalError Text)
type O2CodeStore = MVar (Either AuthEvalError OAuth2Code)
data OAuth2Env
OAuth2Env :: OAuth2Conf -> OAuth2RunTime -> O2CodeStore -> O2CodeXchngStore -> OAuth2Env
[_oAuth2EnvO2conf] :: OAuth2Env -> OAuth2Conf
[_oAuth2EnvO2runTime] :: OAuth2Env -> OAuth2RunTime
[_oAuth2EnvO2codeStore] :: OAuth2Env -> O2CodeStore
[_oAuth2EnvO2codeXchngStore] :: OAuth2Env -> O2CodeXchngStore
class HasO2codeStore s a | s -> a
o2codeStore :: HasO2codeStore s a => Lens' s a
class HasO2codeXchngStore s a | s -> a
o2codeXchngStore :: HasO2codeXchngStore s a => Lens' s a
class HasO2conf s a | s -> a
o2conf :: HasO2conf s a => Lens' s a
class HasO2runTime s a | s -> a
o2runTime :: HasO2runTime s a => Lens' s a
data GCredentials
GCredentials :: Text -> Text -> Text -> Text -> GCredentials
[_gCredentialsClientId] :: GCredentials -> Text
[_gCredentialsClientSecret] :: GCredentials -> Text
[_gCredentialsRefreshToken] :: GCredentials -> Text
[_gCredentialCtype] :: GCredentials -> Text
instance Napkin.Auth.Types.HasClientId Napkin.Auth.Types.GCredentials Data.Text.Internal.Text
instance Napkin.Auth.Types.HasClientSecret Napkin.Auth.Types.GCredentials Data.Text.Internal.Text
instance Napkin.Auth.Types.HasRefreshToken Napkin.Auth.Types.GCredentials Data.Text.Internal.Text
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Napkin.Auth.Types.GCredentials
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Napkin.Auth.Types.GCredentials
instance Napkin.Auth.Types.HasO2runTime Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2Env Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2RunTime
instance Napkin.Auth.Types.HasO2conf Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2Env Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2Conf
instance Napkin.Auth.Types.HasO2codeXchngStore Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2Env Napkin.Auth.Types.O2CodeXchngStore
instance Napkin.Auth.Types.HasO2codeStore Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2Env Napkin.Auth.Types.O2CodeStore
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2Env
instance Napkin.Auth.Types.HasTokenType Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2Token Data.Text.Internal.Text
instance Napkin.Auth.Types.HasScope Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2Token Data.Text.Internal.Text
instance Napkin.Auth.Types.HasRefreshToken Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2Token Data.Text.Internal.Text
instance Napkin.Auth.Types.HasIdToken Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2Token Data.Text.Internal.Text
instance Napkin.Auth.Types.HasExpiresIn Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2Token GHC.Types.Int
instance Napkin.Auth.Types.HasAccessToken Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2Token Data.Text.Internal.Text
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2Token
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2Token
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2Token
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2Token
instance Napkin.Auth.Types.HasOAuth2tmpCredentialFile Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2RunTime GHC.IO.FilePath
instance Napkin.Auth.Types.HasOAuth2credentialFile Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2RunTime GHC.IO.FilePath
instance Napkin.Auth.Types.HasOAuth2codeVerifier Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2RunTime Data.ByteString.Internal.ByteString
instance Napkin.Auth.Types.HasOAuth2codeChallenge Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2RunTime Data.ByteString.Internal.ByteString
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2RunTime
instance Napkin.Auth.Types.HasOAuth2scope Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2Conf (Data.Proxy.Proxy '["openid", "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/userinfo.email", "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform", "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/appengine.admin", "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/compute", "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/accounts.reauth"])
instance Napkin.Auth.Types.HasOAuth2requestUri Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2Conf URI.ByteString.Types.URI
instance Napkin.Auth.Types.HasOAuth2grantType Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2Conf Napkin.Auth.Types.GrantType
instance Napkin.Auth.Types.HasOAuth2encodingAlgorithm Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2Conf Napkin.Auth.Types.EncodingMethod
instance Napkin.Auth.Types.HasOAuth2clientSecret Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2Conf Data.Text.Internal.Text
instance Napkin.Auth.Types.HasOAuth2clientId Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2Conf Data.Text.Internal.Text
instance Napkin.Auth.Types.HasOAuth2callbackPort Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2Conf Napkin.Auth.Types.NetworkPort
instance Napkin.Auth.Types.HasOAuth2callback Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2Conf Data.Text.Internal.Text
instance Napkin.Auth.Types.HasOAuth2accessTokenRequestUri Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2Conf Data.Text.Internal.Text
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Auth.Types.FromUser
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Auth.Types.FromUser
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Napkin.Auth.Types.CredentialFile
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Auth.Types.CredentialFile
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Auth.Types.CredentialFile
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Auth.Types.CredentialFile
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2Conf
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Auth.Types.OAuth2Conf

instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Auth.Types.AuthEvalError

module Napkin.Auth.Utils
tToBS :: Text -> ByteString
tlToBS :: Text -> ByteString
bslToText :: ByteString -> Text

-- | generate a random valid string
encrypt :: ByteString -> ByteString
oAuthChallenge :: IO ByteString
eitherRNG :: Int -> IO ByteString
byteStringToValidString :: ByteString -> ByteString
uriToText :: URI -> Text
asGoogleOAuthClient :: Text -> Text -> OAuthClient

module Napkin.Auth.Web.AuthApiServer
debug :: Bool
app :: OAuth2Env -> IO ()
waiApp :: OAuth2Env -> IO Application
globalErrorHandler :: Text -> ActionM ()
indexH :: ActionM ()
callbackH :: OAuth2Env -> ActionM ()
paramValue :: Text -> [Param] -> [Text]
hasParam :: Text -> Param -> Bool

module Napkin.Auth.GoogleOAuth

-- | initialize napkin oAuth configuration Napkin takes clientId,
--   clientSecret and callback url to initiazlie the oauth configs.
--   configuation parameters are from google oauth api docs,
--   <a>https://developers.google.com/identity/protocols/oauth2/native-app#create-code-challenge</a>
initOAuthConf :: OAuth2ClientId -> OAuth2ClientSecret -> OAuth2Callback -> OAuth2Conf

-- | initialize napkin oAuth runtime parameters
initOAuthRunTime :: MonadIO m => m OAuth2RunTime
configureGoogleOAuthEnv :: (MonadReader OAuth2 m, MonadIO m) => m OAuth2Env
getOAuth2Url :: OAuth2Env -> Text

-- | creates a temporary credential file We attemtp to create a temp
--   credential file. if we can create a Bigquery google environment, then
--   the tmp file is <tt>cashed</tt> for future use
createTmpCredentialFile :: (MonadIO m, MonadCatch m, Katip m) => OAuth2Env -> m FilePath

-- | napkin authentication workflow The work-flow : + creates credential
--   file and stores in OS $TMP folder + attempts to create google env and
--   bigquery env + if success, cache the tmp file napkin well know
--   location for future use.
authWorkflow :: (MonadIO m, MonadCatch m, Katip m) => OAuth2Env -> m ()

-- | napkin reset authentication workflow removes the previously cached
--   napkin auth file for this project
authResetWorkflow :: (MonadIO m, MonadCatch m, Katip m) => OAuth2Env -> m ()
makeGoogleEnvWithCredentials :: (MonadIO m, MonadCatch m, Katip m) => Credentials BigQueryScopes -> m (Env BigQueryScopes)
makeGoogleEnv :: (MonadCatch m, Katip m) => Maybe FilePath -> m GoogleEnv

-- | construct the google oauth endpoint for the OAuth2 Googlew APIs access
--   for additional detail see
--   <a>https://developers.google.com/identity/protocols/oauth2#installed</a>
authorizationUri :: URI
napkinCredFile :: IO FilePath
appendQueryParams :: URIQueryParams -> URIRef a -> URIRef a
toGCredential :: OAuth2Conf -> OAuth2Token -> GCredentials
xchgCodeForToken :: (MonadIO m, MonadCatch m) => OAuth2Env -> OAuth2Code -> m (Either AuthEvalError OAuth2Token)

module Napkin.Auth.GoogleFlow
eval :: (MonadIO m, MonadCatch m, Katip m) => NapkinAuth a -> m ()
oAuthClientFromFile :: (MonadIO m, MonadCatch m) => FilePath -> m NapkinOAuthClient
effectiveNapkinCredentialFile :: (MonadIO m, MonadCatch m) => Maybe FilePath -> m (Maybe FilePath)

module Napkin.Cli.Auth.Types

-- | The supported napkin CLI auth parameters
data AuthCommandOptions
AuthCommandOptions :: Bool -> Text -> Maybe FilePath -> Maybe NapkinOAuthClient -> AuthCommandOptions

-- | reset auth generated OAuth artifacts
[authCommandOptions_clean] :: AuthCommandOptions -> Bool

-- | napkin backend, only bigquery is supported at this time
--   Jul<i>1</i>2021
[authCommandOptions_backend] :: AuthCommandOptions -> Text

-- | Input file containing user credentials, clientId &amp; clientSecret.
--   @see
--   <a>https://google-auth.readthedocs.io/en/latest/user-guide.html#user-credentials</a>
[authCommandOptions_inAuthFile] :: AuthCommandOptions -> Maybe FilePath

-- | google oauth clientId &amp; clientSecret for this Napkin bigquery
--   projects @see
--   <a>https://hackage.haskell.org/package/gogol-0.5.0/docs/Network-Google-Auth.html#g:9</a>
[authCommandOptions_oAuthClient] :: AuthCommandOptions -> Maybe NapkinOAuthClient
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Cli.Auth.Types.AuthCommandOptions
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Cli.Auth.Types.AuthCommandOptions

module Napkin.Cli.Auth.Parser

-- | The <tt>authParser</tt> function parses the napkin Auth CLI commands
parser :: Parser AuthCommandOptions
oauthClientParser :: Parser NapkinOAuthClient

module Napkin.Cli.Init.TemplateRef
data TemplateRef
TemplateRef :: String -> TemplateAddr -> TemplateRef
[_templateRef_input] :: TemplateRef -> String
[_templateRef_parsed] :: TemplateRef -> TemplateAddr
data ServiceRepo
ServiceRepo :: RepoService -> Text -> Text -> ServiceRepo
[_serviceRepo_service] :: ServiceRepo -> RepoService
[_serviceRepo_user] :: ServiceRepo -> Text
[_serviceRepo_templateName] :: ServiceRepo -> Text
data RepoService
Bitbucket :: RepoService
Github :: RepoService
Gitlab :: RepoService
data TemplateAddr
AbsAddr :: Path Abs File -> TemplateAddr
RelAddr :: Text -> Path Rel File -> TemplateAddr
UrlAddr :: Text -> TemplateAddr
BuiltIn :: Text -> TemplateAddr
RepoAddr :: ServiceRepo -> TemplateAddr
templateRef_parsed :: Lens' TemplateRef TemplateAddr
templateRef_input :: Lens' TemplateRef String
parseTemplateRef :: Text -> Either String TemplateRef
parseServiceRepo :: Text -> Maybe ServiceRepo
parseUserRepo :: RepoService -> Text -> Maybe ServiceRepo
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Cli.Init.TemplateRef.TemplateRef
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Cli.Init.TemplateRef.RepoService
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Cli.Init.TemplateRef.RepoService
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Cli.Init.TemplateRef.ServiceRepo
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Cli.Init.TemplateRef.ServiceRepo
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Cli.Init.TemplateRef.TemplateAddr
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Cli.Init.TemplateRef.TemplateAddr
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Cli.Init.TemplateRef.TemplateRef

module Napkin.Cli.Init.TemplateProjectInstatiator
createProjectFromTemplate :: InitFromTemplate -> IO (Path Abs Dir)
data InitFromTemplate
InitFromTemplate :: TemplateRef -> Map Text Text -> ProjectName -> OverwriteFiles -> CurrentDir -> InitGitRepo -> InitFromTemplate
[_initFromTemplate_templateRef] :: InitFromTemplate -> TemplateRef
[_initFromTemplate_nonceParams] :: InitFromTemplate -> Map Text Text
[_initFromTemplate_projectName] :: InitFromTemplate -> ProjectName
[_initFromTemplate_overwriteExistingFiles] :: InitFromTemplate -> OverwriteFiles
[_initFromTemplate_currentDirectory] :: InitFromTemplate -> CurrentDir
[_initFromTemplate_initGitRepo] :: InitFromTemplate -> InitGitRepo
newtype InitGitRepo
InitGitRepo :: Bool -> InitGitRepo
newtype CurrentDir
CurrentDir :: Bool -> CurrentDir
newtype OverwriteFiles
OverwriteFiles :: Bool -> OverwriteFiles
initFromTemplate_overwriteExistingFiles :: Lens' InitFromTemplate OverwriteFiles
initFromTemplate_templateRef :: Lens' InitFromTemplate TemplateRef
initFromTemplate_projectName :: Lens' InitFromTemplate ProjectName
initFromTemplate_initGitRepo :: Lens' InitFromTemplate InitGitRepo
writeBinaryFileAtomic :: MonadIO m => Path absrel File -> Builder -> m ()
listBuiltInTemplates :: MonadIO m => m ()
data InitTplException
FailedToLoadTemplate :: !TemplateRef -> !FilePath -> InitTplException
FailedToDownloadTemplate :: !TemplateRef -> !VerifiedDownloadException -> InitTplException
AlreadyExists :: !Path Abs Dir -> InitTplException
MissingParameters :: ProjectName -> TemplateRef -> Set String -> InitTplException
InvalidTemplate :: !TemplateRef -> !String -> InitTplException
AttemptedOverwrites :: [Path Abs File] -> InitTplException
instance GHC.Exception.Type.Exception Napkin.Cli.Init.TemplateProjectInstatiator.InitTplException
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Cli.Init.TemplateProjectInstatiator.InitTplException
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Cli.Init.TemplateProjectInstatiator.TemplateFrom
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Cli.Init.TemplateProjectInstatiator.TemplateFrom

module Napkin.Cli.Repl.Types
newtype ReplCommandOptions
ReplCommandOptions :: FilePath -> ReplCommandOptions

-- | spec file path
[replCommandOption_specFile] :: ReplCommandOptions -> FilePath
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Cli.Repl.Types.ReplCommandOptions
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Cli.Repl.Types.ReplCommandOptions

module Napkin.Cli.Repl.Parser
parser :: Parser ReplCommandOptions

module Napkin.Repl.ReplInitialCommands
replConfig :: ReplConfig

module Napkin.Types
data Name
Specific :: String -> Name
Star :: Name
nameString :: Name -> String
_name :: Iso' String Name
name :: String -> Name

-- | A way to refer to entities like fields, tables, schemas, etc.
--   Namespacing is common so we keep a list here.
newtype Ref a
Ref :: NonEmpty Name -> Ref a
[_unRef] :: Ref a -> NonEmpty Name

-- | Class of string-like types that can be interpreted as <a>Ref</a>s
class IsRef a
ref :: forall b. IsRef a => a -> Ref b

-- | Return the number of <a>Name</a>s in the <a>Ref</a>.
refComponentCount :: Ref a -> Int
stringRefIso :: Iso' String (Ref a)
stringRef :: String -> Ref a
nameRef :: Name -> Ref a
namesRef :: [Name] -> Ref a
refString :: Ref t -> String
retagRef :: Ref t -> Ref a
appendRef :: Ref a -> Name -> Ref a
star :: SExp
data Table
data Function

-- | Select something and give it a name; e.g. (my_field as foo)
data Selected a
Selected :: Ref a -> a -> Selected a
[_selectRef] :: Selected a -> Ref a
[_selectItem] :: Selected a -> a

-- | Like selected, but aliasing is optional
data Alias a
Alias :: Maybe (Ref a) -> a -> Alias a
[_aliasRef] :: Alias a -> Maybe (Ref a)
[_aliasItem] :: Alias a -> a
nonAlias :: a -> Alias a
class WithName a

-- | e.g. <tt>var "foo" <a>as</a> "bar"</tt>
as :: WithName a => b -> Ref b -> a b

-- | Flipped <a>as</a>
sa :: WithName a => Ref b -> b -> a b
selectToAlias :: Selected a -> Alias a
data Value
VDouble :: Double -> Value
VInt :: Int64 -> Value
VBool :: Bool -> Value
VDate :: Day -> Value
VDateTime :: UTCTime -> Value
VText :: Text -> Value
VBinary :: ByteString -> Value
VInterval :: Interval -> Value
VNull :: Value
VDatePart :: DatePart -> Value
VArray :: [SExp] -> Value

-- | Intervals could internally make use of expressions
newtype Interval
Interval :: [(SExp, DatePart)] -> Interval
[_unInterval] :: Interval -> [(SExp, DatePart)]

-- | A simpler sub-variant to <a>Interval</a> that fits certain cases
--   better. Maps onto <a>Interval</a> underneath.
data IntInterval
IntInterval :: SExp -> DatePart -> IntInterval
data SExp
Lit :: Value -> SExp
Var :: Ref SExp -> SExp

-- | external function call
Extern :: ExternFun -> SExp

-- | case with a final default
Case :: [(SExp, SExp)] -> SExp -> SExp

-- | t.* EXCEPT(a,b,c)
ExceptColumns :: SExp -> [Ref SExp] -> SExp
SubQuery :: Query -> SExp
var :: Ref a -> SExp
varString :: String -> SExp
nil :: SExp
data NullStrategy
IgnoreNulls :: NullStrategy
RespectNulls :: NullStrategy
data Distinctness
Distinct :: Distinctness
NonDistinct :: Distinctness
type Partition = [SExp]
data WOver
WOver :: Partition -> Order -> Maybe WindowFrame -> WOver
[_overPartition] :: WOver -> Partition
[_overOrder] :: WOver -> Order
[_overFrame] :: WOver -> Maybe WindowFrame
data WindowFun
SimpleWindow :: Ref Function -> [SExp] -> WOver -> Maybe NullStrategy -> WindowFun
data WindowFrame
WindowBetween :: FrameLength -> FrameLength -> WindowFrame
WindowFrom :: FrameLength -> WindowFrame
data FrameLength
CurrentRow :: FrameLength
Unbounded :: FrameLength
LimitedPreceding :: Int -> FrameLength
LimitedFollowing :: Int -> FrameLength
data FunModifier
ModDistinct :: Distinctness -> FunModifier
ModNulls :: NullStrategy -> FunModifier
ModOrder :: Order -> FunModifier
ModLimit :: Int -> FunModifier
ModOver :: WOver -> FunModifier
data ExternFun
SimpleExtern :: Ref Function -> [SExp] -> ExternFun
ModExtern :: Ref Function -> [SExp] -> [FunModifier] -> ExternFun
Cast :: SExp -> Type -> ExternFun
SafeCast :: SExp -> Type -> ExternFun
ExternWindow :: WindowFun -> ExternFun
ExternRaw :: String -> ExternFun
data Type
TySmallInt :: Type
TyInteger :: Type
TyBigInt :: Type
TyDecimal :: Type
TyReal :: Type
TyDouble :: Type
TyBool :: Type
TyChar :: Type
TyVarChar :: Type
TyVarCharWithLen :: Int -> Type
TyDate :: Type
TyTimestamp :: Type
TyDatetime :: Type
data DatePart
Millennium :: DatePart
Century :: DatePart
Decade :: DatePart
Epoch :: DatePart
Year :: DatePart
Quarter :: DatePart
Month :: DatePart
Week :: DatePart
DayOfWeek :: DatePart
DayOfYear :: DatePart
Day :: DatePart
Hour :: DatePart
Minute :: DatePart
Second :: DatePart
Millisecond :: DatePart
Microsecond :: DatePart
type Order = [OrderPart]
type GroupBy = [SExp]
data OrderDir
Asc :: OrderDir
Desc :: OrderDir

-- | Flip order
invertOrder :: OrderDir -> OrderDir
data NullOrder
NullsFirst :: NullOrder
NullsLast :: NullOrder
data OrderPart
OrderPart :: SExp -> OrderDir -> Maybe NullOrder -> OrderPart
[_opExp] :: OrderPart -> SExp
[_opOrder] :: OrderPart -> OrderDir
[_opNulls] :: OrderPart -> Maybe NullOrder
order :: SExp -> OrderPart
data Relation
TableRelation :: Ref Table -> Relation
QueryRelation :: Query -> Relation
ArrayRelation :: SExp -> Relation

-- | a raw relation with its dependencies
RawRelation :: [Ref Table] -> String -> Relation

-- | treat a reference as relation
table :: Ref a -> Relation
data JoinType
JoinLeft :: JoinType
JoinRight :: JoinType
JoinInner :: JoinType
JoinCross :: JoinType
JoinOuter :: JoinType
data From
From :: Selected Relation -> [(Selected Relation, JoinType, Either (Maybe SExp) [Ref SExp])] -> From
fromAliases :: From -> [Ref Relation]
true :: SExp
false :: SExp
data UnionType
SetUnion :: UnionType
DuplicateUnion :: UnionType
IntersectUnion :: UnionType
MinusUnion :: UnionType
data RawQuery
RawQuery :: [Ref Table] -> String -> RawQuery
[_rawQuery_deps] :: RawQuery -> [Ref Table]
[_rawQuery_raw] :: RawQuery -> String
type WithClauses = OMap (Ref Query) (Selected Query)
orderWithInserted :: WithClauses -> [(Ref Query, Selected Query)]
data Query
Query :: WithClauses -> [Alias SExp] -> Maybe From -> Maybe SExp -> Maybe SExp -> GroupBy -> Order -> Maybe Int -> Maybe Int -> Distinctness -> Query
[_queryWith] :: Query -> WithClauses
[_querySelect] :: Query -> [Alias SExp]
[_queryFrom] :: Query -> Maybe From
[_queryWhere] :: Query -> Maybe SExp
[_queryHaving] :: Query -> Maybe SExp
[_queryGroup] :: Query -> GroupBy
[_queryOrder] :: Query -> Order
[_queryLimit] :: Query -> Maybe Int
[_queryOffset] :: Query -> Maybe Int
[_queryDistinct] :: Query -> Distinctness
Union :: UnionType -> Query -> Query -> WithClauses -> Query
[_unionType] :: Query -> UnionType
[_unionQuery1] :: Query -> Query
[_unionQuery2] :: Query -> Query

-- | unions may share with clauses
[_unionWiths] :: Query -> WithClauses

-- | A raw query with all the dependencies contained therein
QueryRaw :: RawQuery -> Query
emptyQuery :: Query

-- | Convenience: Combine list of queries via union of the same type
mkUnion :: UnionType -> [Query] -> Query

-- | Pull apart any UNIONs and extract a flat list of non-union queries.
collectUnionQueries :: Query -> [Query]

-- | OO-style wrapper for objects that contain a full query definition
data DefinedRelation
DefinedRelation :: s -> DefinedRelation

-- | Like <a>DefinedRelation</a>, but only requires a defined query.
data DefinedQuery
DefinedQuery :: s -> DefinedQuery
class AsRelation s
asRelation :: AsRelation s => s -> Relation
class HasDefinition s
defQuery :: HasDefinition s => Lens s s Query Query

-- | Things that may or may not contain an explicit Query inside
class MaybeQuery s
getQuery :: MaybeQuery s => s -> Maybe Query

-- | Has <tt>select *</tt> been used anywhere inside this thing? If so,
--   False.
queryFullySpecified :: Data a => a -> Bool
opOrder :: Lens' OrderPart OrderDir
opNulls :: Lens' OrderPart (Maybe NullOrder)
opExp :: Lens' OrderPart SExp
rawQuery_raw :: Lens' RawQuery String
rawQuery_deps :: Lens' RawQuery [Ref Table]
unionWiths :: Traversal' Query WithClauses
unionType :: Traversal' Query UnionType
unionQuery2 :: Traversal' Query Query
unionQuery1 :: Traversal' Query Query
queryWith :: Traversal' Query WithClauses
queryWhere :: Traversal' Query (Maybe SExp)
querySelect :: Traversal' Query [Alias SExp]
queryOrder :: Traversal' Query Order
queryOffset :: Traversal' Query (Maybe Int)
queryLimit :: Traversal' Query (Maybe Int)
queryHaving :: Traversal' Query (Maybe SExp)
queryGroup :: Traversal' Query GroupBy
queryFrom :: Traversal' Query (Maybe From)
queryDistinct :: Traversal' Query Distinctness
_QueryRaw :: Prism' Query RawQuery
_Union :: Prism' Query (UnionType, Query, Query, WithClauses)
_Query :: Prism' Query (WithClauses, [Alias SExp], Maybe From, Maybe SExp, Maybe SExp, GroupBy, Order, Maybe Int, Maybe Int, Distinctness)
_From :: Iso' From (Selected Relation, [(Selected Relation, JoinType, Either (Maybe SExp) [Ref SExp])])
_Star :: Prism' Name ()
_Specific :: Prism' Name String
_JoinOuter :: Prism' JoinType ()
_JoinCross :: Prism' JoinType ()
_JoinInner :: Prism' JoinType ()
_JoinRight :: Prism' JoinType ()
_JoinLeft :: Prism' JoinType ()
_RawRelation :: Prism' Relation ([Ref Table], String)
_ArrayRelation :: Prism' Relation SExp
_QueryRelation :: Prism' Relation Query
_TableRelation :: Prism' Relation (Ref Table)
unRef :: forall a_a1bJD a_a1kHH. Iso (Ref a_a1bJD) (Ref a_a1kHH) (NonEmpty Name) (NonEmpty Name)
_VArray :: Prism' Value [SExp]
_VDatePart :: Prism' Value DatePart
_VNull :: Prism' Value ()
_VInterval :: Prism' Value Interval
_VBinary :: Prism' Value ByteString
_VText :: Prism' Value Text
_VDateTime :: Prism' Value UTCTime
_VDate :: Prism' Value Day
_VBool :: Prism' Value Bool
_VInt :: Prism' Value Int64
_VDouble :: Prism' Value Double
_Microsecond :: Prism' DatePart ()
_Millisecond :: Prism' DatePart ()
_Second :: Prism' DatePart ()
_Minute :: Prism' DatePart ()
_Hour :: Prism' DatePart ()
_Day :: Prism' DatePart ()
_DayOfYear :: Prism' DatePart ()
_DayOfWeek :: Prism' DatePart ()
_Week :: Prism' DatePart ()
_Month :: Prism' DatePart ()
_Quarter :: Prism' DatePart ()
_Year :: Prism' DatePart ()
_Epoch :: Prism' DatePart ()
_Decade :: Prism' DatePart ()
_Century :: Prism' DatePart ()
_Millennium :: Prism' DatePart ()
_SubQuery :: Prism' SExp Query
_ExceptColumns :: Prism' SExp (SExp, [Ref SExp])
_Case :: Prism' SExp ([(SExp, SExp)], SExp)
_Extern :: Prism' SExp ExternFun
_Var :: Prism' SExp (Ref SExp)
_Lit :: Prism' SExp Value
selectRef :: forall a_a1bJA. Lens' (Selected a_a1bJA) (Ref a_a1bJA)
selectItem :: forall a_a1bJA. Lens' (Selected a_a1bJA) a_a1bJA
aliasRef :: forall a_a1bJz. Lens' (Alias a_a1bJz) (Maybe (Ref a_a1bJz))
aliasItem :: forall a_a1bJz. Lens' (Alias a_a1bJz) a_a1bJz
overPartition :: Lens' WOver Partition
overOrder :: Lens' WOver Order
overFrame :: Lens' WOver (Maybe WindowFrame)
class Val a
val :: Val a => Prism' Value a
integral :: (Integral a, Integral b) => Iso' a b
_lit :: Val a => Prism' SExp a
lit :: Val a => a -> SExp

-- | Shorthand for using literal Doubles in making interval expressions.
interval :: [(Double, DatePart)] -> SExp

-- | Monomorphic converter to make it easy to type string literals under
--   OverloadedStrings
txt :: String -> SExp

-- | Convenient starting point for full window (unbounded) for cases where
--   not specifying window defaults to a partial window. (E.g. BigQuery)
fullWindow :: WOver
class TableRef a
tableRef :: TableRef a => Lens' a (Ref Table)
relationRef :: TableRef a => Getter a Relation

-- | Class of things that have external table dependencies
class HasDeps a
traverseDependencies :: HasDeps a => Traversal' a (Ref Table)
tableDependencies :: HasDeps s => s -> [Ref Table]

-- | Figure out external table dependencies within a construct - e.g. Query
--   or one of the commands.
--   
--   TODO Potential (unsure) bugs in here due to inner scopes spilling and
--   clashing with names in outer scopes. Seems to work but can use proper
--   extensive testing.
queryDependencies :: Data s => Traversal' s (Ref Table)

-- | Extract deps from object, render to string and wrap into a
--   <a>RawRelation</a>
rawRelation :: HasDeps s => (s -> String) -> s -> Relation

-- | Polymorphic to support refs that come out of Relations, etc.
varAs :: Ref a -> Selected SExp
asSelf :: SExp -> Selected SExp

-- | Apply function to a Ref and select it by the same name as the ref.
--   Common use case in SELECT queries.
funAs :: (SExp -> b) -> Ref b -> Selected b

-- | Use the name of a <a>Selected</a> as a reference. Typically when
--   you've computed a field in a subquery or a previous table, and you're
--   now using that computation directly via its name.
selectToRef :: Selected SExp -> SExp
selectedExps :: Traversal' [Selected a] a
selectedNames :: Traversal' [Selected a0] String

-- | Pull the last name out of a Ref. E.g. if Ref contains a
--   schema.table_name, pull just the table_name out.
refName :: Applicative f => (String -> f String) -> Ref a -> f (Ref a1)

-- | Get final segments on the ref path and grab the name
refRoot :: Lens' (Ref a) Name
refJustRoot :: Ref a -> Ref a
refParentRoot :: Ref a -> ([String], Maybe String)
ne :: Iso' [a] (NonEmpty a)
selectedName :: Traversal' (Selected a) Name
atAlias :: (Applicative f, Choice p) => Ref t -> Optic' p f (Alias t) (Alias t)
aliasedNames :: HasDefinition s => Traversal' s (Ref SExp)

-- | Attach all column references within expression to given (table)
--   reference.
scopeRefs :: Data b => Ref t -> b -> b

-- | Deep traverse structure and apply given name-changing function to each
--   table's name but only if the table has been used in a FROM statement
--   as a source table.
modifyFromTables :: Data b => (Ref Table -> Ref Table) -> b -> b
modifyFunctions :: Data b => (Ref Function -> Ref Function) -> b -> b

-- | Attach given name on the relation
(^^.) :: Ref Relation -> Name -> SExp
infixl 9 ^^.
data AggLevel

-- | Expression is at the row level
Unit :: AggLevel

-- | Aggregate functions, like <a>sum</a>
Agg :: AggLevel

-- | Analytic level (some backends)
Analytic :: AggLevel
data StatsType
HookStats :: StatsType
ActionStats :: StatsType

-- | Used for tracking per-table and hook query statistics.
data TrackingQueryStats
TrackingQueryStats :: Map (Ref Table, StatsType) QueryStats -> QueryStats -> QueryStats -> TrackingQueryStats

-- | tracks individual QueryStats for each table and per-table hooks
[_trackingQueryStats_tables] :: TrackingQueryStats -> Map (Ref Table, StatsType) QueryStats

-- | tracks QueryStats for Spec-level hooks
[_trackingQueryStats_hooks] :: TrackingQueryStats -> QueryStats

-- | tracks QueryStats which are not associated with a specific table
[_trackingQueryStats_unassociated] :: TrackingQueryStats -> QueryStats

-- | returns QueryStats, for the table creation spec and also for the
--   spec's tables
queryStatsForTable :: Ref Table -> TrackingQueryStats -> (Maybe QueryStats, Maybe QueryStats)
totalQueryStatsForTable :: Ref Table -> TrackingQueryStats -> QueryStats
totalQueryStats :: TrackingQueryStats -> QueryStats

-- | Used for aggregate statistics gathered from running queries.
data QueryStats
QueryStats :: !Maybe Int64 -> !Maybe Int64 -> !Maybe Int64 -> !Maybe Int64 -> QueryStats
[_queryStats_rowsAffected] :: QueryStats -> !Maybe Int64
[_queryStats_bytesAffected] :: QueryStats -> !Maybe Int64

-- | in U.S. pennies
[_queryStats_cost] :: QueryStats -> !Maybe Int64

-- | milliseconds
[_queryStats_time] :: QueryStats -> !Maybe Int64
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.AggLevel
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.AggLevel
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.AggLevel
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.AggLevel
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.AggLevel
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.StatsType
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.StatsType
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.StatsType
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.QueryStats
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.QueryStats
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.TrackingQueryStats
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.TrackingQueryStats
instance GHC.Base.Monoid Napkin.Types.TrackingQueryStats
instance GHC.Base.Semigroup Napkin.Types.TrackingQueryStats
instance GHC.Base.Monoid Napkin.Types.QueryStats
instance GHC.Base.Semigroup Napkin.Types.QueryStats
instance Napkin.Types.HasDeps Napkin.Types.Query
instance Napkin.Types.HasDeps Napkin.Types.Relation
instance Napkin.Types.HasDeps a => Napkin.Types.HasDeps [a]
instance Napkin.Types.HasDeps a => Napkin.Types.HasDeps (Napkin.Types.Selected a)
instance Napkin.Types.HasDeps Napkin.Types.From
instance Napkin.Types.HasDeps Napkin.Types.SExp
instance Napkin.Types.TableRef (Napkin.Types.Ref Napkin.Types.Table)
instance Napkin.Types.Val Napkin.Types.Value
instance Napkin.Types.Val GHC.Types.Double
instance Napkin.Types.Val GHC.Int.Int64
instance Napkin.Types.Val GHC.Types.Int
instance Napkin.Types.Val Data.Time.Calendar.Days.Day
instance Napkin.Types.Val Data.Time.Clock.Internal.UTCTime.UTCTime
instance Napkin.Types.Val Data.Text.Internal.Text
instance Napkin.Types.Val GHC.Types.Bool
instance Napkin.Types.Val Data.ByteString.Internal.ByteString
instance Napkin.Types.Val GHC.Base.String
instance Napkin.Types.Val Napkin.Types.DatePart
instance Napkin.Types.Val [Napkin.Types.SExp]
instance Napkin.Types.Val Napkin.Types.IntInterval
instance Napkin.Types.Val a => Napkin.Types.Val (GHC.Maybe.Maybe a)
instance Control.Lens.Cons.Snoc (Napkin.Types.Ref a) (Napkin.Types.Ref a) Napkin.Types.Name Napkin.Types.Name
instance Control.Lens.Cons.Cons (Napkin.Types.Ref a) (Napkin.Types.Ref a) Napkin.Types.Name Napkin.Types.Name
instance Language.Haskell.TH.Syntax.Lift Napkin.Types.Name
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Napkin.Types.Name
instance Control.DeepSeq.NFData Napkin.Types.Name
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.Name
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.Name
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.Name
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.Name
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.Name
instance Control.DeepSeq.NFData (Napkin.Types.Ref a)
instance GHC.Base.Semigroup (Napkin.Types.Ref a)
instance Language.Haskell.TH.Syntax.Lift (Napkin.Types.Ref a)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Napkin.Types.Ref a)
instance Data.Data.Data a => Data.Data.Data (Napkin.Types.Ref a)
instance GHC.Classes.Ord (Napkin.Types.Ref a)
instance GHC.Read.Read (Napkin.Types.Ref a)
instance GHC.Show.Show (Napkin.Types.Ref a)
instance GHC.Classes.Eq (Napkin.Types.Ref a)
instance Language.Haskell.TH.Syntax.Lift a => Language.Haskell.TH.Syntax.Lift (Napkin.Types.Selected a)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Napkin.Types.Selected a)
instance Control.DeepSeq.NFData a => Control.DeepSeq.NFData (Napkin.Types.Selected a)
instance Data.Data.Data a => Data.Data.Data (Napkin.Types.Selected a)
instance GHC.Read.Read a => GHC.Read.Read (Napkin.Types.Selected a)
instance GHC.Show.Show a => GHC.Show.Show (Napkin.Types.Selected a)
instance GHC.Classes.Ord a => GHC.Classes.Ord (Napkin.Types.Selected a)
instance GHC.Classes.Eq a => GHC.Classes.Eq (Napkin.Types.Selected a)
instance Language.Haskell.TH.Syntax.Lift a => Language.Haskell.TH.Syntax.Lift (Napkin.Types.Alias a)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Napkin.Types.Alias a)
instance Control.DeepSeq.NFData a => Control.DeepSeq.NFData (Napkin.Types.Alias a)
instance Data.Data.Data a => Data.Data.Data (Napkin.Types.Alias a)
instance GHC.Read.Read a => GHC.Read.Read (Napkin.Types.Alias a)
instance GHC.Show.Show a => GHC.Show.Show (Napkin.Types.Alias a)
instance GHC.Classes.Ord a => GHC.Classes.Ord (Napkin.Types.Alias a)
instance GHC.Classes.Eq a => GHC.Classes.Eq (Napkin.Types.Alias a)
instance Language.Haskell.TH.Syntax.Lift Napkin.Types.NullStrategy
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Napkin.Types.NullStrategy
instance Control.DeepSeq.NFData Napkin.Types.NullStrategy
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.NullStrategy
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.NullStrategy
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.NullStrategy
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.NullStrategy
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.NullStrategy

instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.WOver

instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.WOver
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.WOver
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.WOver

instance GHC.Generics.Generic Napkin.Types.OrderPart

instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.OrderPart

instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.OrderPart

instance GHC.Generics.Generic Napkin.Types.FunModifier

instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.FunModifier

instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.FunModifier

instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.FunModifier

instance Control.DeepSeq.NFData Napkin.Types.ExternFun
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.ExternFun

instance GHC.Generics.Generic Napkin.Types.SExp

instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.SExp

instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.SExp
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.SExp
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.SExp

instance GHC.Generics.Generic Napkin.Types.Relation
instance Control.DeepSeq.NFData Napkin.Types.Relation
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.Relation
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.Relation
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.Relation
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.Relation
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.Relation
instance Language.Haskell.TH.Syntax.Lift Napkin.Types.From
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Napkin.Types.From
instance Control.DeepSeq.NFData Napkin.Types.From
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.From
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.From
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.From
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.From
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.From
instance Language.Haskell.TH.Syntax.Lift Napkin.Types.Query
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Napkin.Types.Query
instance Control.DeepSeq.NFData Napkin.Types.Query
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.Query
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.Query
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.Query
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.Query
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.Query
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.IntInterval
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.IntInterval
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.IntInterval
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.IntInterval
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.IntInterval
instance Language.Haskell.TH.Syntax.Lift (GHC.Base.NonEmpty Napkin.Types.Name)
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.Table
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.Function
instance Napkin.Types.MaybeQuery Napkin.Types.Query
instance Napkin.Types.MaybeQuery Napkin.Types.Relation
instance Napkin.Types.AsRelation Napkin.Types.DefinedRelation
instance Napkin.Types.HasDefinition Napkin.Types.Query
instance Napkin.Types.AsRelation Napkin.Types.Query
instance Napkin.Types.AsRelation Napkin.Types.Relation
instance Napkin.Types.AsRelation (Napkin.Types.Ref a)
instance Data.Default.Class.Default Napkin.Types.WOver
instance Data.String.IsString Napkin.Types.Relation
instance Data.Default.Class.Default Napkin.Types.Distinctness
instance Napkin.Types.WithName Napkin.Types.Selected
instance Napkin.Types.WithName Napkin.Types.Alias
instance Data.Foldable.Foldable Napkin.Types.Alias
instance Data.Foldable.Foldable Napkin.Types.Selected
instance Data.String.IsString (Napkin.Types.Ref a)
instance Napkin.Types.IsRef (Napkin.Types.Ref a)
instance Napkin.Types.IsRef GHC.Base.String
instance Napkin.Types.IsRef Data.Text.Internal.Text
instance Napkin.Types.IsRef Napkin.Types.Name
instance Napkin.Types.IsRef [Napkin.Types.Name]
instance Napkin.Types.IsRef (GHC.Base.NonEmpty Napkin.Types.Name)
instance Data.String.IsString Napkin.Types.Name
instance (Language.Haskell.TH.Syntax.Lift k, Language.Haskell.TH.Syntax.Lift v) => Language.Haskell.TH.Syntax.Lift (Data.Map.Ordered.Internal.OMap k v)
instance (Control.DeepSeq.NFData k, Control.DeepSeq.NFData v) => Control.DeepSeq.NFData (Data.Map.Ordered.Internal.OMap k v)
instance GHC.Classes.Ord k => GHC.Base.Semigroup (Data.Map.Ordered.Internal.OMap k v)
instance GHC.Classes.Ord k => GHC.Base.Monoid (Data.Map.Ordered.Internal.OMap k v)
instance GHC.Classes.Ord k => Control.Lens.At.At (Data.Map.Ordered.Internal.OMap k a)
instance GHC.Classes.Ord k => Control.Lens.At.Ixed (Data.Map.Ordered.Internal.OMap k a)

module Napkin.Spec.Graph.Types
data TableType
ExternalTableType :: TableType
ManagedTableType :: TableType
type SpecDepGraph = Gr SpecDepGraphLabel ()
newtype SpecDepGraphLabel
SpecDepGraphLabel :: (Ref Table, TableType) -> SpecDepGraphLabel
[unLabel] :: SpecDepGraphLabel -> (Ref Table, TableType)
gTableRef :: SpecDepGraphLabel -> Ref Table
gTableType :: SpecDepGraphLabel -> TableType
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.Graph.Types.TableType
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.Graph.Types.SpecDepGraphLabel

module Napkin.Optimization.UnusedCteFields.Visitor
data SumOfSExpQueryExternFunWindowFunWOverOrderPartFromValueIntervalOrderSExpListGroupBy
CaseSExp :: SExp -> SumOfSExpQueryExternFunWindowFunWOverOrderPartFromValueIntervalOrderSExpListGroupBy
CaseQuery :: Query -> SumOfSExpQueryExternFunWindowFunWOverOrderPartFromValueIntervalOrderSExpListGroupBy
CaseExternFun :: ExternFun -> SumOfSExpQueryExternFunWindowFunWOverOrderPartFromValueIntervalOrderSExpListGroupBy
CaseWindowFun :: WindowFun -> SumOfSExpQueryExternFunWindowFunWOverOrderPartFromValueIntervalOrderSExpListGroupBy
CaseWOver :: WOver -> SumOfSExpQueryExternFunWindowFunWOverOrderPartFromValueIntervalOrderSExpListGroupBy
CaseOrderPart :: OrderPart -> SumOfSExpQueryExternFunWindowFunWOverOrderPartFromValueIntervalOrderSExpListGroupBy
CaseFrom :: From -> SumOfSExpQueryExternFunWindowFunWOverOrderPartFromValueIntervalOrderSExpListGroupBy
CaseValue :: Value -> SumOfSExpQueryExternFunWindowFunWOverOrderPartFromValueIntervalOrderSExpListGroupBy
CaseInterval :: Interval -> SumOfSExpQueryExternFunWindowFunWOverOrderPartFromValueIntervalOrderSExpListGroupBy
CaseOrder :: Order -> SumOfSExpQueryExternFunWindowFunWOverOrderPartFromValueIntervalOrderSExpListGroupBy
CaseSExpList :: SExpList -> SumOfSExpQueryExternFunWindowFunWOverOrderPartFromValueIntervalOrderSExpListGroupBy
CaseGroupBy :: GroupBy -> SumOfSExpQueryExternFunWindowFunWOverOrderPartFromValueIntervalOrderSExpListGroupBy
type SumOfSExpTypes = SumOfSExpQueryExternFunWindowFunWOverOrderPartFromValueIntervalOrderSExpListGroupBy
type SExpReducer args b m = SumOfSExpTypes -> b -> ControllableTraverseT args SumOfSExpTypes m b
visitSumOfSExpTypes :: Monad m => SExpReducer args b m -> args -> SumOfSExpTypes -> b -> m b
class Monad m => ControllableTraverse funArgs nodeSum (m :: Type -> Type) | m -> funArgs nodeSum
replaceBranch :: ControllableTraverse funArgs nodeSum m => nodeSum -> m ()
pushSubNodeArgs :: ControllableTraverse funArgs nodeSum m => funArgs -> m ()
getNodeArgs :: ControllableTraverse funArgs nodeSum m => m funArgs
type SExpList = [SExp]
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Optimization.UnusedCteFields.Visitor.SumOfSExpQueryExternFunWindowFunWOverOrderPartFromValueIntervalOrderSExpListGroupBy

module Napkin.Optimization.UnusedCteFields
detectUnusedColumns :: Query -> [(Ref Table, Selected SExp)]
discoverUnusedCteFields :: Query -> CteTables
fieldsOfCteQueries :: WithClauses -> CteTables
type CteTables = Map TableName [CteField]
data CteField
CteField :: FieldName -> TableName -> Alias SExp -> CteField
[_cteField_name] :: CteField -> FieldName
[_cteField_table] :: CteField -> TableName
[_cteField_exp] :: CteField -> Alias SExp
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Optimization.UnusedCteFields.CteField
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Optimization.UnusedCteFields.CteField
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Optimization.UnusedCteFields.CteField
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Optimization.UnusedCteFields.SExpVisitorParams
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Optimization.UnusedCteFields.SExpVisitorParams

module Napkin.Types.Commands.BigQuery
data Model
data Replacement
Replacement_CreateOnly :: Replacement
Replacement_CreateIfMissing :: Replacement
Replacement_CreateOrReplace :: Replacement
data ModelType
ModelType_LinearRegression :: ModelType
ModelType_LogisticRegression :: ModelType
data SplitMethod
SplitMethod_Auto :: SplitMethod
SplitMethod_Random :: SplitMethod
SplitMethod_Custom :: String -> SplitMethod
SplitMethod_Seq :: String -> SplitMethod
SplitMethod_NoSplit :: SplitMethod
data ModelOptions
ModelOptions :: ModelType -> Maybe Double -> Maybe Double -> Maybe Int -> Maybe SplitMethod -> Maybe Double -> ModelOptions
[_modelOptions_modelType] :: ModelOptions -> ModelType
[_modelOptions_l1reg] :: ModelOptions -> Maybe Double
[_modelOptions_l2reg] :: ModelOptions -> Maybe Double
[_modelOptions_maxIterations] :: ModelOptions -> Maybe Int
[_modelOptions_splitMethod] :: ModelOptions -> Maybe SplitMethod
[_modelOptions_splitEvalFraction] :: ModelOptions -> Maybe Double
data CreateModel
CreateModel :: Ref Model -> Replacement -> ModelOptions -> Query -> CreateModel
[_createModel_modelName] :: CreateModel -> Ref Model
[_createModel_replacement] :: CreateModel -> Replacement
[_createModel_modelOptions] :: CreateModel -> ModelOptions
[_createModel_trainingData] :: CreateModel -> Query
data ML_Predict
ML_Predict :: Ref Model -> Query -> ML_Predict
[_mlPredict_model] :: ML_Predict -> Ref Model
[_mlPredict_data] :: ML_Predict -> Query
mlPredict_model :: Lens' ML_Predict (Ref Model)
mlPredict_data :: Lens' ML_Predict Query
createModel_trainingData :: Lens' CreateModel Query
createModel_replacement :: Lens' CreateModel Replacement
createModel_modelOptions :: Lens' CreateModel ModelOptions
createModel_modelName :: Lens' CreateModel (Ref Model)
modelOptions_splitMethod :: Lens' ModelOptions (Maybe SplitMethod)
modelOptions_splitEvalFraction :: Lens' ModelOptions (Maybe Double)
modelOptions_modelType :: Lens' ModelOptions ModelType
modelOptions_maxIterations :: Lens' ModelOptions (Maybe Int)
modelOptions_l2reg :: Lens' ModelOptions (Maybe Double)
modelOptions_l1reg :: Lens' ModelOptions (Maybe Double)
instance Napkin.Types.HasDeps Napkin.Types.Commands.BigQuery.ML_Predict
instance Napkin.Types.HasDeps Napkin.Types.Commands.BigQuery.CreateModel
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.Commands.BigQuery.Replacement
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.Commands.BigQuery.Replacement
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.Commands.BigQuery.Replacement
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.Commands.BigQuery.Replacement
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.Commands.BigQuery.ModelType
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.Commands.BigQuery.ModelType
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.Commands.BigQuery.ModelType
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.Commands.BigQuery.ModelType
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.Commands.BigQuery.SplitMethod
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.Commands.BigQuery.SplitMethod
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.Commands.BigQuery.SplitMethod
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.Commands.BigQuery.SplitMethod
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.Commands.BigQuery.ModelOptions
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.Commands.BigQuery.ModelOptions
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.Commands.BigQuery.ModelOptions
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.Commands.BigQuery.ModelOptions
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.Commands.BigQuery.CreateModel
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.Commands.BigQuery.CreateModel
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.Commands.BigQuery.CreateModel
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.Commands.BigQuery.CreateModel
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.Commands.BigQuery.ML_Predict
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.Commands.BigQuery.ML_Predict
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.Commands.BigQuery.ML_Predict
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.Commands.BigQuery.ML_Predict

module Napkin.Types.Commands.Grant
data Privilege
Select :: Privilege
Insert :: Privilege
Update :: Privilege
Delete :: Privilege
References :: Privilege
Usage :: Privilege
Create :: Privilege
Temporary :: Privilege
Temp :: Privilege
AllPrivileges :: Privilege
data Schema
data Database
data Object
ObjectTable :: Ref Table -> Object
ObjectSchema :: Ref Schema -> Object
ObjectDatabase :: Ref Database -> Object
newtype GrantOption
GrantOption :: Bool -> GrantOption
[_unGrantOption] :: GrantOption -> Bool
withGrant :: GrantOption
withoutGrant :: GrantOption
data Actor
User :: Text -> GrantOption -> Actor
Group :: Text -> Actor
Public :: Actor
data Grant
Grant :: [Privilege] -> [Object] -> [Actor] -> Grant
[_grantPrivs] :: Grant -> [Privilege]
[_grantObjects] :: Grant -> [Object]
[_grantActors] :: Grant -> [Actor]
grantPrivs :: Lens' Grant [Privilege]
grantObjects :: Lens' Grant [Object]
grantActors :: Lens' Grant [Actor]
unGrantOption :: Iso' GrantOption Bool
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.Commands.Grant.Privilege
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.Commands.Grant.Privilege
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.Commands.Grant.Privilege
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.Commands.Grant.Privilege
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.Commands.Grant.Privilege
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.Commands.Grant.Object
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.Commands.Grant.Object
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.Commands.Grant.Object
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.Commands.Grant.Object
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.Commands.Grant.Object
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.Commands.Grant.GrantOption
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.Commands.Grant.GrantOption
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.Commands.Grant.GrantOption
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.Commands.Grant.GrantOption
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.Commands.Grant.Actor
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.Commands.Grant.Actor
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.Commands.Grant.Actor
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.Commands.Grant.Actor
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.Commands.Grant.Schema
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.Commands.Grant.Database

module Napkin.Types.Commands
newtype GetRelationSchema
GetRelationSchema :: Relation -> GetRelationSchema
[_grsRelation] :: GetRelationSchema -> Relation
newtype CheckTableExists
CheckTableExists :: Ref Table -> CheckTableExists
[_cteTable] :: CheckTableExists -> Ref Table

-- | TODO: Add in the USING clause
data DeleteFrom
DeleteFrom :: Ref Table -> SExp -> DeleteFrom
[_dfTable] :: DeleteFrom -> Ref Table
[_dfWhere] :: DeleteFrom -> SExp
data InsertIntoQuery
InsertIntoQuery :: Ref Table -> Query -> InsertIntoQuery
[_iiqTable] :: InsertIntoQuery -> Ref Table
[_iiqQuery] :: InsertIntoQuery -> Query

-- | Drop a table
data DropTable
DropTable :: Ref Table -> Bool -> Bool -> DropTable
[_dtName] :: DropTable -> Ref Table
[_dtIfExists] :: DropTable -> Bool
[_dtCascade] :: DropTable -> Bool

-- | Drop a table
data DropView
DropView :: Ref Table -> Bool -> Bool -> DropView
[_dvName] :: DropView -> Ref Table
[_dvIfExists] :: DropView -> Bool
[_dvCascade] :: DropView -> Bool
data CreateViewAs
CreateViewAs :: Ref Table -> Query -> CreateViewAs
[_cvaName] :: CreateViewAs -> Ref Table
[_cvaQuery] :: CreateViewAs -> Query
data CopyTable
CopyTable :: Ref Table -> Ref Table -> CopyTable
[_ctFrom] :: CopyTable -> Ref Table
[_ctTo] :: CopyTable -> Ref Table
data RenameTable
RenameTable :: Ref Table -> Ref Table -> RenameTable
[_rtFrom] :: RenameTable -> Ref Table
[_rtTo] :: RenameTable -> Ref Table

-- | Create table based on a query with variable metadata type, such as
--   <tt>TableMeta</tt>
data CreateTableAs meta
CreateTableAs :: meta -> Ref Table -> Query -> CreateTableAs meta
[_ctaMeta] :: CreateTableAs meta -> meta
[_ctaName] :: CreateTableAs meta -> Ref Table
[_ctaQuery] :: CreateTableAs meta -> Query

-- | Operations like <tt>recreate</tt> often result in ambiguous types at
--   application site. In general, we need to be able to infer a type for
--   the table metadata type for each backend. Our life is complicated by
--   the likes of Redshift <tt>TableMeta</tt>
class HasCreateTableAs bk where {
    type family BackendTableMeta bk;
}
createTable :: Default d => Ref Table -> Query -> CreateTableAs d
dropView :: Ref Table -> DropView
dropTable :: Ref Table -> DropTable
createToInsert :: CreateTableAs m -> InsertIntoQuery
ctaMeta :: forall meta_a2Ysj meta_a2ZGh. Lens (CreateTableAs meta_a2Ysj) (CreateTableAs meta_a2ZGh) meta_a2Ysj meta_a2ZGh
ctaName :: forall meta_a2Ysj. Lens' (CreateTableAs meta_a2Ysj) (Ref Table)
ctaQuery :: forall meta_a2Ysj. Lens' (CreateTableAs meta_a2Ysj) Query
cvaName :: Lens' CreateViewAs (Ref Table)
cvaQuery :: Lens' CreateViewAs Query
rtFrom :: Lens' RenameTable (Ref Table)
rtTo :: Lens' RenameTable (Ref Table)
ctFrom :: Lens' CopyTable (Ref Table)
ctTo :: Lens' CopyTable (Ref Table)
dtCascade :: Lens' DropTable Bool
dtIfExists :: Lens' DropTable Bool
dtName :: Lens' DropTable (Ref Table)
dvCascade :: Lens' DropView Bool
dvIfExists :: Lens' DropView Bool
dvName :: Lens' DropView (Ref Table)
iiqQuery :: Lens' InsertIntoQuery Query
iiqTable :: Lens' InsertIntoQuery (Ref Table)
dfTable :: Lens' DeleteFrom (Ref Table)
dfWhere :: Lens' DeleteFrom SExp
cteTable :: Iso' CheckTableExists (Ref Table)
class Drop a b | a -> b
dropCommand :: Drop a b => a -> b
dropCascade :: Drop a b => a -> Lens' b Bool
grsRelation :: Iso' GetRelationSchema Relation
instance Napkin.Types.Commands.Drop Napkin.Types.Commands.CreateViewAs Napkin.Types.Commands.DropView
instance Napkin.Types.Commands.Drop (Napkin.Types.Commands.CreateTableAs ()) Napkin.Types.Commands.DropTable
instance Napkin.Types.TableRef (Napkin.Types.Commands.CreateTableAs m)
instance Napkin.Types.HasDeps (Napkin.Types.Commands.CreateTableAs m)
instance Napkin.Types.AsRelation (Napkin.Types.Commands.CreateTableAs m)
instance Napkin.Types.HasDefinition (Napkin.Types.Commands.CreateTableAs m)
instance Napkin.Types.MaybeQuery (Napkin.Types.Commands.CreateTableAs m)
instance Napkin.Types.TableRef Napkin.Types.Commands.InsertIntoQuery
instance Napkin.Types.TableRef Napkin.Types.Commands.DeleteFrom
instance Napkin.Types.TableRef Napkin.Types.Commands.DropView
instance Napkin.Types.TableRef Napkin.Types.Commands.CreateViewAs
instance Napkin.Types.AsRelation Napkin.Types.Commands.CreateViewAs
instance Napkin.Types.HasDeps Napkin.Types.Commands.CreateViewAs
instance Data.Data.Data meta => Data.Data.Data (Napkin.Types.Commands.CreateTableAs meta)
instance GHC.Read.Read meta => GHC.Read.Read (Napkin.Types.Commands.CreateTableAs meta)
instance GHC.Show.Show meta => GHC.Show.Show (Napkin.Types.Commands.CreateTableAs meta)
instance GHC.Classes.Eq meta => GHC.Classes.Eq (Napkin.Types.Commands.CreateTableAs meta)
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.Commands.RenameTable
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.Commands.RenameTable
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.Commands.RenameTable
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.Commands.RenameTable
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.Commands.CopyTable
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.Commands.CopyTable
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.Commands.CopyTable
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.Commands.CopyTable
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.Commands.CreateViewAs
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.Commands.CreateViewAs
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.Commands.CreateViewAs
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.Commands.CreateViewAs
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.Commands.DropView
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.Commands.DropView
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.Commands.DropView
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.Commands.DropView
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.Commands.DropTable
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.Commands.DropTable
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.Commands.DropTable
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.Commands.DropTable
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.Commands.InsertIntoQuery
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.Commands.InsertIntoQuery
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.Commands.InsertIntoQuery
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.Commands.InsertIntoQuery
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.Commands.DeleteFrom
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.Commands.DeleteFrom
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.Commands.DeleteFrom
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.Commands.DeleteFrom
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.Commands.CheckTableExists
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.Commands.CheckTableExists
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.Commands.CheckTableExists
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.Commands.CheckTableExists
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.Commands.GetRelationSchema
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.Commands.GetRelationSchema
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.Commands.GetRelationSchema
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.Commands.GetRelationSchema

module Napkin.Types.BigQuery
data BigQuery
BigQuery :: BigQuery
newtype BQProjectId
BQProjectId :: Text -> BQProjectId
[unBQProjectId] :: BQProjectId -> Text
newtype BQDatasetId
BQDatasetId :: Text -> BQDatasetId
[unBQDatasetId] :: BQDatasetId -> Text

-- | Represents the non-recursive bigquery types
--   <a>https://cloud.google.com/bigquery/docs/reference/standard-sql/data-types</a>
data BigQueryType
BQString :: BigQueryType
BQBytes :: BigQueryType
BQDate :: BigQueryType
BQDateTime :: BigQueryType
BQTime :: BigQueryType
BQInt64 :: BigQueryType
BQFloat64 :: BigQueryType
BQBool :: BigQueryType
BQTimestamp :: BigQueryType
bqTypeString :: (IsString s, Eq s) => Prism' s BigQueryType

-- | <a>https://cloud.google.com/storage/docs/naming</a> Between 3 and 63
--   chars, all lowercase, beginning and ending with alphanum, middle can
--   contain alphanum or <a>-</a>,'_', and <a>.</a>. Avoid <a>.</a> in the
--   bucket name as it requires verification. Also, common misspellings of
--   google and IP addreses are not allowed but the risk of that seemed low
--   so I omitted those rules.
data GCSBucket
gcsBucket :: GCSBucket -> Text
mkGCSBucket :: Text -> Either GCSBucketNameError GCSBucket

-- | Omits rules about IP address bucket names or close misspellings of
--   google.
data GCSBucketNameError
GCSBBadChars :: !Set Char -> GCSBucketNameError
GCSBInvalidStart :: !Char -> GCSBucketNameError
GCSBInvalidEnd :: !Char -> GCSBucketNameError
GCSBTooShort :: GCSBucketNameError
GCSBTooLong :: GCSBucketNameError

-- | <a>https://cloud.google.com/storage/docs/naming</a> No newlines,
--   between 1 and 1024 chars
data GCSKey
gcsKey :: GCSKey -> Text
mkGCSKey :: Text -> Either GCSKeyError GCSKey
data GCSKeyError
GCSKTooShort :: GCSKeyError
GCSKTooLong :: GCSKeyError
GCSKBadChars :: !Set Char -> GCSKeyError
newtype BQTableId
BQTableId :: Text -> BQTableId
[unBQTableId] :: BQTableId -> Text

-- | An entity which holds an ACL for an object or bucket in google cloud
--   storage. I believe this means that whoever the entity targets can only
--   hold one ACL, so you use this to do targeted/idempotent
--   inserts<i>replacements of permissions on objects</i>buckets.
data GCSACLEntity
ACLEUserId :: !GCUserId -> GCSACLEntity
ACLEUserEmail :: !GCUserEmail -> GCSACLEntity
ACLEGroupId :: !GCGroupId -> GCSACLEntity
ACLEGroupEmail :: !GCGroupEmail -> GCSACLEntity
ACLEDomain :: !GCDomain -> GCSACLEntity
ACLEProject :: !GCTeam -> !GCProjectId -> GCSACLEntity
ACLEAllUsers :: GCSACLEntity
ACLEAllAuthenticatedUsers :: GCSACLEntity
gcsACLEntityText :: Prism' Text GCSACLEntity
data GCSACLRole
ACLReader :: GCSACLRole
ACLWriter :: GCSACLRole
ACLOwner :: GCSACLRole
gcsACLRoleText :: Prism' Text GCSACLRole
newtype GCUserId
GCUserId :: Text -> GCUserId
[gcUserID] :: GCUserId -> Text
newtype GCUserEmail
GCUserEmail :: Text -> GCUserEmail
[gcUserEmail] :: GCUserEmail -> Text
newtype GCGroupId
GCGroupId :: Text -> GCGroupId
[gcGroupId] :: GCGroupId -> Text
newtype GCGroupEmail
GCGroupEmail :: Text -> GCGroupEmail
[gcGroupEmail] :: GCGroupEmail -> Text
newtype GCDomain
GCDomain :: Text -> GCDomain
[gcDomain] :: GCDomain -> Text
newtype GCTeam
GCTeam :: Text -> GCTeam
[gcTeam] :: GCTeam -> Text
newtype GCProjectId
GCProjectId :: Text -> GCProjectId
[gcProjectId] :: GCProjectId -> Text
data TableMeta
TableMeta :: Maybe (ColumnName, [ColumnName]) -> Maybe WriteDisposition -> TableMeta
[_tableMeta_partitionCluster] :: TableMeta -> Maybe (ColumnName, [ColumnName])
[_tableMeta_writeDisposition] :: TableMeta -> Maybe WriteDisposition
type ColumnName = String
data WriteDisposition
WriteDisposition_WriteEmpty :: WriteDisposition
WriteDisposition_WriteAppend :: WriteDisposition
WriteDisposition_WriteTruncate :: WriteDisposition
emptyTableMeta :: TableMeta
tableMeta :: ColumnName -> [ColumnName] -> TableMeta
tableMeta_partitionCluster :: Lens' TableMeta (Maybe (ColumnName, [ColumnName]))
tableMeta_writeDisposition :: Lens' TableMeta (Maybe WriteDisposition)

-- | Deconstruct a Ref into project, dataset, and table name components.
refComponents :: Ref a -> (Name, Name, Name)
componentsRef :: (Name, Name, Name) -> Ref a
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BQProjectId
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BQProjectId
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BQProjectId
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BQProjectId
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BQDatasetId
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BQDatasetId
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BQDatasetId
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BQDatasetId
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BQTableId
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BQTableId
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BQTableId
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BQTableId
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BigQueryType
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BigQueryType
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BigQueryType
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BigQueryType
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCSBucket
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCSBucket
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCSBucket
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCSBucketNameError
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCSBucketNameError
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCSKey
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCSKey
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCSKey
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCSKeyError
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCSKeyError
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCSACLRole
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCSACLRole
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCSACLRole
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCUserId
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCUserId
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCUserId
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCGroupId
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCGroupId
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCGroupId
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCUserEmail
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCUserEmail
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCUserEmail
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCGroupEmail
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCGroupEmail
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCGroupEmail
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCDomain
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCDomain
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCDomain
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCTeam
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCTeam
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCTeam
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCProjectId
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCProjectId
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCProjectId
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCSACLEntity
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCSACLEntity
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.BigQuery.GCSACLEntity
instance Data.Default.Class.Default Napkin.Types.BigQuery.TableMeta
instance Napkin.Types.Commands.HasCreateTableAs Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BigQuery
instance Napkin.Types.Commands.Drop (Napkin.Types.Commands.CreateTableAs Napkin.Types.BigQuery.TableMeta) Napkin.Types.Commands.DropTable
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BigQuery
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BigQuery
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BigQuery
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BigQuery
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BigQuery
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.BigQuery.WriteDisposition
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.BigQuery.WriteDisposition
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.BigQuery.WriteDisposition
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.BigQuery.WriteDisposition
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.BigQuery.WriteDisposition
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.BigQuery.TableMeta
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.BigQuery.TableMeta
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.BigQuery.TableMeta
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.BigQuery.TableMeta
instance Napkin.Types.Backend.ReifiesBackend Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BigQuery

module Napkin.Types.Postgres
data Postgres
Postgres :: Postgres
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.Postgres.Postgres
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.Postgres.Postgres
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.Postgres.Postgres
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.Postgres.Postgres
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.Postgres.Postgres
instance Napkin.Types.Backend.ReifiesBackend Napkin.Types.Postgres.Postgres
instance Napkin.Types.Commands.HasCreateTableAs Napkin.Types.Postgres.Postgres

module Napkin.Types.Redshift
data Redshift
Redshift :: Redshift
data TableMeta
TableMeta :: Bool -> Bool -> DistStyle -> Maybe SortKey -> TableMeta
[_tmLocal] :: TableMeta -> Bool
[_tmTemp] :: TableMeta -> Bool
[_tmDistStyle] :: TableMeta -> DistStyle
[_tmSorting] :: TableMeta -> Maybe SortKey
defTableMeta :: TableMeta
data DistStyle
DistEven :: DistStyle
DistKey :: SExp -> DistStyle
DistAll :: DistStyle
data SortStyle
SortCompound :: SortStyle
SortInterleaved :: SortStyle
data SortKey
SortKey :: SortStyle -> [SExp] -> SortKey
_SortInterleaved :: Prism' SortStyle ()
_SortCompound :: Prism' SortStyle ()
_DistAll :: Prism' DistStyle ()
_DistKey :: Prism' DistStyle SExp
_DistEven :: Prism' DistStyle ()
_SortKey :: Iso' SortKey (SortStyle, [SExp])
tmTemp :: Lens' TableMeta Bool
tmSorting :: Lens' TableMeta (Maybe SortKey)
tmLocal :: Lens' TableMeta Bool
tmDistStyle :: Lens' TableMeta DistStyle
instance Napkin.Types.Commands.Drop (Napkin.Types.Commands.CreateTableAs Napkin.Types.Redshift.TableMeta) Napkin.Types.Commands.DropTable
instance Napkin.Types.Commands.HasCreateTableAs Napkin.Types.Redshift.Redshift
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.Redshift.Redshift
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Types.Redshift.Redshift
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.Redshift.Redshift
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.Redshift.Redshift
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.Redshift.Redshift
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.Redshift.DistStyle
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.Redshift.DistStyle
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.Redshift.DistStyle
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.Redshift.DistStyle
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.Redshift.SortStyle
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.Redshift.SortStyle
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.Redshift.SortStyle
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.Redshift.SortStyle
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.Redshift.SortKey
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.Redshift.SortKey
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.Redshift.SortKey
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.Redshift.SortKey
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Types.Redshift.TableMeta
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Types.Redshift.TableMeta
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Types.Redshift.TableMeta
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Types.Redshift.TableMeta
instance Data.Default.Class.Default Napkin.Types.Redshift.TableMeta
instance Data.Default.Class.Default Napkin.Types.Redshift.SortStyle
instance Data.Default.Class.Default Napkin.Types.Redshift.DistStyle
instance Napkin.Types.Backend.ReifiesBackend Napkin.Types.Redshift.Redshift

module Napkin.Untyped.Ops

-- | Basic aggregations
avg :: SExp -> SExp
max :: SExp -> SExp
min :: SExp -> SExp
sum :: SExp -> SExp
count :: SExp -> SExp

-- | Distinct count of expression
countd :: SExp -> SExp

-- | Function calls and common control flow
nullary :: Ref Function -> SExp
unary :: Ref Function -> SExp -> SExp
binary :: Ref Function -> SExp -> SExp -> SExp
triple :: Ref Function -> SExp -> SExp -> SExp -> SExp
multiple :: Ref Function -> [SExp] -> SExp
raw :: String -> SExp
simpleWindow :: Ref Function -> [SExp] -> WOver -> Maybe NullStrategy -> SExp
modExtern :: Ref Function -> [SExp] -> [FunModifier] -> SExp
case_ :: [(SExp, SExp)] -> SExp -> SExp
caseMatch_ :: SExp -> [(SExp, SExp)] -> SExp -> SExp
if_ :: SExp -> SExp -> SExp -> SExp

-- | Basic arithmetic
sign :: SExp -> SExp
(/.) :: SExp -> SExp -> SExp

-- | Type casts
cast :: SExp -> Type -> SExp
asText :: SExp -> SExp
asDouble :: SExp -> SExp
asInt :: SExp -> SExp
asBool :: SExp -> SExp
asDate :: SExp -> SExp
asTimestamp :: SExp -> SExp

-- | Logical operators
(==.) :: SExp -> SExp -> SExp
infix 4 ==.
(/=.) :: SExp -> SExp -> SExp
infix 4 /=.
(>=.) :: SExp -> SExp -> SExp
infix 4 >=.
(>.) :: SExp -> SExp -> SExp
infix 4 >.
(<=.) :: SExp -> SExp -> SExp
infix 4 <=.
(<.) :: SExp -> SExp -> SExp
infix 4 <.
is :: SExp -> SExp -> SExp
isNot :: SExp -> SExp -> SExp
isNull :: SExp -> SExp
notNull :: SExp -> SExp
exists :: Query -> SExp
notExists :: Query -> SExp
in_ :: SExp -> [SExp] -> SExp
notIn :: SExp -> [SExp] -> SExp
always :: SExp
never :: SExp
any_ :: SExp -> SExp
all_ :: SExp -> SExp
some_ :: SExp -> SExp
not :: SExp -> SExp
(.&&.) :: SExp -> SExp -> SExp
infixr 3 .&&.
(.||.) :: SExp -> SExp -> SExp
infixr 2 .||.
and :: [SExp] -> SExp
or :: [SExp] -> SExp
maxOf :: SExp -> SExp -> SExp
minOf :: SExp -> SExp -> SExp

-- | Higher level combinators and utilities
--   
--   sum 1
hardCount :: SExp

-- | Replace <tt>exp</tt> if its equal to <tt>val</tt> with
--   <tt>replace</tt>.
valueIf :: SExp -> SExp -> SExp -> SExp

-- | Set to null unless predicate is true
nullifyUnless :: SExp -> SExp -> SExp

-- | Set to null if predicate is true
nullifyIf :: SExp -> SExp -> SExp

-- | Make empty string NULL.
nullifyIfEmpty :: SExp -> SExp

-- | Apply a function on Lits and Vars, recursing deep into function calls,
--   etc.
deepApply :: (SExp -> SExp) -> SExp -> SExp

-- | Common case of a string column possibly being empty either by being a
--   blank string or properly being NULL.
isEmpty :: SExp -> SExp

-- | Opposite of <a>isEmpty</a>
notEmpty :: SExp -> SExp

-- | (Agg) Count number of <tt>True</tt>s in a boolean expression.
countTrue :: SExp -> SExp

-- | True -&gt; 1, False -&gt; 0
boolToInt :: SExp -> SExp

-- | TODO. This is may have holes; we need a principled end-to-end review
--   of this transformation. Perhaps even put it as a primitive into the
--   SExp type.
scopeGeneric :: [(Ref Function, SExp)] -> SExp -> SExp -> SExp
data BackendFunctionMeta
BackendFunctionMeta :: [(Ref Function, SExp)] -> [Ref Function] -> BackendFunctionMeta

-- | Aggregating functions with their mzero values under their aggregation
[_backendFunctionMeta_aggs] :: BackendFunctionMeta -> [(Ref Function, SExp)]

-- | Analytic functions
[_backendFunctionMeta_analytics] :: BackendFunctionMeta -> [Ref Function]
backendFunctionMeta_analytics :: Lens' BackendFunctionMeta [Ref Function]
backendFunctionMeta_aggs :: Lens' BackendFunctionMeta [(Ref Function, SExp)]

-- | Infer aggregation level of an expression.
--   
--   TODO: ExternRaw cant be inferred at the moment; needs more info inside
--   the SExp if this becomes a problem.
inferAggGeneric :: BackendFunctionMeta -> SExp -> AggLevel

-- | Explore expression's insides to pull out top level <a>Unit</a>
--   expressions within its branches, but no deeper in each branch.
--   
--   Originally created to help with common expression caching - since you
--   can commonolize unit-level expressions without any side-effect.
unitBoundaryGeneric :: BackendFunctionMeta -> SExp -> [SExp]
modifyUnitBoundaryGeneric :: BackendFunctionMeta -> (SExp -> SExp) -> SExp -> SExp
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Untyped.Ops.BackendFunctionMeta
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Untyped.Ops.BackendFunctionMeta
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Untyped.Ops.BackendFunctionMeta
instance GHC.Num.Num Napkin.Types.SExp
instance GHC.Real.Fractional Napkin.Types.SExp

module Napkin.Untyped.Monad

-- | Supply of fresh reference names to be used in monadic contexts where
--   you need an infinite-ish supply.
data RefStore
RefStore :: [String] -> Set String -> RefStore
[_refStore_feed] :: RefStore -> [String]
[_refStore_blacklist] :: RefStore -> Set String
refStore_feed :: Lens' RefStore [String]
refStore_blacklist :: Lens' RefStore (Set String)
class HasRefStore s
refRepo :: HasRefStore s => Lens' s RefStore
letters :: String
newRefStore :: RefStore
newRef :: (HasRefStore s, MonadState s m) => m (Ref a)
newQState :: QState
data QState
QState :: RefStore -> Query -> QState
[_qsVars] :: QState -> RefStore
[_qsQuery] :: QState -> Query
qsVars :: Lens' QState RefStore
qsQuery :: Lens' QState Query
newtype Q a
Q :: State QState a -> Q a
[_runQ] :: Q a -> State QState a
runQ :: Q a -> (a, Query)
mkQ :: Q a -> Query
evalQ :: Q c -> c

-- | Alter a pre-existing Query monadically.
modQ :: Query -> Q a -> Query
asQuery :: Iso' (Q ()) Query
with_ :: Query -> Q (Ref Relation)

-- | Define a subquery using the <tt>WITH</tt> syntax. Note that this does
--   not automatically include this table in a SELECT; you need to
--   additionally include the resulting relation from <a>withQ_</a> using
--   the <a>from_</a> operator.
withQ_ :: Q a -> Q (Ref Relation)
withQ'_ :: Q a -> Q (Ref Relation, Query)
withQAs_ :: Ref Query -> Q a -> Q (Ref Table)

-- | Define a WITH subquery while retaining and re-using its given name.
--   Useful in some scenarios where you want to keep the original name in
--   further referring to the newly introduced subquery table.
withAs_ :: Selected Query -> Q (Ref Table)

-- | Use unique naming scheme along with Ref Relation to construct the WITH
--   macro's name. This is useful when ensuring unique naming while not
--   throwing out some human-readable information.
withAsUnique :: Selected Query -> Q (Ref Table)

-- | Smart selector that will use the variable's name if expression is a
--   variable and assign a fresh variable name if it's something else
--   without a name.
select_ :: SExp -> Q (Ref SExp)
selectAs_ :: Selected SExp -> Q (Ref SExp)
selectsAs_ :: [Selected SExp] -> Q [Ref SExp]

-- | Add optional aliasing to the Q.
selectAs_' :: Alias SExp -> Q (Maybe (Ref SExp))
selectsAs_' :: [Alias SExp] -> Q [Maybe (Ref SExp)]

-- | Select a field and also include it in GROUP BY. Do this intelligently,
--   referring to it by its given name in most cases but by its direct
--   expression definition in case of external functions to prevent overlap
--   with fields that may already exist.
selectsGroupsAs_ :: [Selected SExp] -> Q ()

-- | Like <a>selectsGroupsAs_</a> but will use the name you gave to each
--   field in the group by statement. Some backends like BigQuery require
--   this while others like Redshift don't like it.
selectsGroupsAsRef_ :: [Selected SExp] -> Q ()

-- | Special convenience case: Select and group while demanding that none
--   of the group values is null.
selectNonEmptyGroups :: [Selected SExp] -> Q ()
from_ :: Relation -> Q (Ref Relation)

-- | Add a from clause unless the relation is already in place.
fromIfNecessary :: Relation -> Q (Ref Relation)
fromSelected_ :: Selected Relation -> Q (Ref Relation)
fromAlias_ :: Alias Relation -> Q (Ref Relation)

-- | Use a name directly and don't alias it one more time. | This can fail
--   to create a proper alias if the Ref includes multiple names.
fromRef_ :: Ref Relation -> Q (Ref Relation)
fromRel :: AsRelation r => r -> Q (Ref Relation)

-- | Returns True iff the current Query already has an initial From table
--   available.
fromSpecified :: Q Bool
fromOrJoin :: Alias Relation -> Either (Ref Relation -> Maybe SExp) [Ref SExp] -> Q (Ref Relation)
join_ :: JoinType -> Relation -> (Ref Relation -> Maybe SExp) -> Q (Ref Relation)
joinUsing_ :: JoinType -> Relation -> [Ref SExp] -> Q (Ref Relation)
