CustomCreate :: [Ref Table] -> (TableStatus -> QueryTransformer -> SpecMetaArgs -> BackendConn b -> ComboT IO ()) -> CreateAction b
[_createAction_customCreate_deps] :: CreateAction b -> [Ref Table]
[_createAction_customCreate_action] :: CreateAction b -> TableStatus -> QueryTransformer -> SpecMetaArgs -> BackendConn b -> ComboT IO ()
data TableSpec b
TableSpec :: Ref Table -> Maybe (BackendTableMeta b) -> CreateAction b -> [Hook b] -> [Hook b] -> [UpdateStrategy] -> [([Privilege], [Actor])] -> [TableSpecTag] -> TableSpec b
[_specTable] :: TableSpec b -> Ref Table
[_specTableOptions] :: TableSpec b -> Maybe (BackendTableMeta b)
[_specAction] :: TableSpec b -> CreateAction b
[_specPreHooks] :: TableSpec b -> [Hook b]
[_specPostHooks] :: TableSpec b -> [Hook b]
[_specUpdate] :: TableSpec b -> [UpdateStrategy]
[_specGrants] :: TableSpec b -> [([Privilege], [Actor])]

-- | allows subgraph execution
[_specTags] :: TableSpec b -> [TableSpecTag]
type TableSpecTag = String

-- | Each strategy acts independently. For example, if you have only
--   UpdateWithDependency, it wouldn't update even if the table were
--   missing. You need to specify each strategy in the list.
data UpdateStrategy
UpdatePeriodically :: NominalDiffTime -> UpdateStrategy
UpdateIfMissing :: UpdateStrategy
UpdateAlways :: UpdateStrategy
UpdateWithDependency :: UpdateStrategy

-- | Status when a table is about to be evaluated for update.
data TableStatus
TableStatus :: Maybe SpecRun -> Bool -> DepChain -> TableStatus

-- | Last time this table was run
[_tstatusLastUpdate] :: TableStatus -> Maybe SpecRun
[_tstatusExists] :: TableStatus -> Bool

-- | Current status of the dependencies
[_tstatusDeps] :: TableStatus -> DepChain
type SpecTableMap b = Map (Ref Table) (TableSpec b)
type SpecMetaArgs = Map Text Value
data Specs b
Specs :: SpecTableMap b -> [([Ref Table], Hook b)] -> SpecMetaArgs -> Specs b
[_specsTables] :: Specs b -> SpecTableMap b

-- | independent hooks that can run as soon as given dependencies are ready
[_specsHooks] :: Specs b -> [([Ref Table], Hook b)]

-- | arguments which can be passed to custom creators
[_specsMetaArgs] :: Specs b -> SpecMetaArgs
newtype Spec b a
Spec :: StateT (Specs b) IO a -> Spec b a
[_runSpec] :: Spec b a -> StateT (Specs b) IO a
runSpec :: Spec b a -> IO (Specs b)
class HasSpec s bk
pullSpec :: HasSpec s bk => s -> IO (Specs bk)
ssTables :: Iso' SpecState (Map (Ref Table) SpecRun)
unShowing :: forall a_a4DWJ a_a4GhU. Iso (Showing a_a4DWJ) (Showing a_a4GhU) a_a4DWJ a_a4GhU
srTable_ :: Lens' SpecRun (Ref Table)
srStarted_ :: Lens' SpecRun UTCTime
srServerTime_ :: Lens' SpecRun (Maybe Int64)
srRunId_ :: Lens' SpecRun (Maybe Int)
srRowsAffected_ :: Lens' SpecRun (Maybe Int64)
srHookServerTime_ :: Lens' SpecRun (Maybe Int64)
srHookRowsAffected_ :: Lens' SpecRun (Maybe Int64)
srHookCost_ :: Lens' SpecRun (Maybe Int64)
srHookBytesAffected_ :: Lens' SpecRun (Maybe Int64)
srError_ :: Lens' SpecRun (Maybe Text)
srDeps_ :: Lens' SpecRun (Maybe (Showing DepChain))
srCost_ :: Lens' SpecRun (Maybe Int64)
srComplete_ :: Lens' SpecRun (Maybe UTCTime)
srBytesAffected_ :: Lens' SpecRun (Maybe Int64)
srApp_ :: Lens' SpecRun Pipeline
srAction_ :: Lens' SpecRun (Maybe Text)
specUpdate :: forall b_a4Fe8. Lens' (TableSpec b_a4Fe8) [UpdateStrategy]
specTags :: forall b_a4Fe8. Lens' (TableSpec b_a4Fe8) [TableSpecTag]
specTableOptions :: forall b_a4Fe8. Lens' (TableSpec b_a4Fe8) (Maybe (BackendTableMeta b_a4Fe8))
specTable :: forall b_a4Fe8. Lens' (TableSpec b_a4Fe8) (Ref Table)
specPreHooks :: forall b_a4Fe8. Lens' (TableSpec b_a4Fe8) [Hook b_a4Fe8]
specPostHooks :: forall b_a4Fe8. Lens' (TableSpec b_a4Fe8) [Hook b_a4Fe8]
specGrants :: forall b_a4Fe8. Lens' (TableSpec b_a4Fe8) [([Privilege], [Actor])]
specAction :: forall b_a4Fe8. Lens' (TableSpec b_a4Fe8) (CreateAction b_a4Fe8)
tstatusLastUpdate :: Lens' TableStatus (Maybe SpecRun)
tstatusExists :: Lens' TableStatus Bool
tstatusDeps :: Lens' TableStatus DepChain
specsTables :: forall b_a4Fe6. Lens' (Specs b_a4Fe6) (SpecTableMap b_a4Fe6)
specsMetaArgs :: forall b_a4Fe6. Lens' (Specs b_a4Fe6) SpecMetaArgs
specsHooks :: forall b_a4Fe6. Lens' (Specs b_a4Fe6) [([Ref Table], Hook b_a4Fe6)]
createAction_withQuery_transformer :: forall b_a4Fe9. Traversal' (CreateAction b_a4Fe9) QueryTransformer
createAction_withQuery_targetType :: forall b_a4Fe9. Traversal' (CreateAction b_a4Fe9) SpecTarget
createAction_withQuery_source :: forall b_a4Fe9. Traversal' (CreateAction b_a4Fe9) SqlSource
createAction_withQuery_qs :: forall b_a4Fe9. Traversal' (CreateAction b_a4Fe9) [Query]
createAction_withQuery_q1 :: forall b_a4Fe9. Traversal' (CreateAction b_a4Fe9) Query
createAction_withQuery_deps :: forall b_a4Fe9. Traversal' (CreateAction b_a4Fe9) [Ref Table]
createAction_withQuery_blacklistDeps :: forall b_a4Fe9. Traversal' (CreateAction b_a4Fe9) [Ref Table]
createAction_customCreate_deps :: forall b_a4Fe9. Traversal' (CreateAction b_a4Fe9) [Ref Table]
createAction_customCreate_action :: forall b_a4Fe9 b_a4GzF. Traversal (CreateAction b_a4Fe9) (CreateAction b_a4GzF) (TableStatus -> QueryTransformer -> SpecMetaArgs -> BackendConn b_a4Fe9 -> ComboT IO ()) (TableStatus -> QueryTransformer -> SpecMetaArgs -> BackendConn b_a4GzF -> ComboT IO ())
createAction_createRawSql_transformer :: forall b_a4Fe9. Traversal' (CreateAction b_a4Fe9) QueryTransformer
createAction_createRawSql_templateVars :: forall b_a4Fe9. Traversal' (CreateAction b_a4Fe9) SqlTemplateVariables
createAction_createRawSql_targetType :: forall b_a4Fe9. Traversal' (CreateAction b_a4Fe9) SpecTarget
createAction_createRawSql_file :: forall b_a4Fe9. Traversal' (CreateAction b_a4Fe9) FilePath
createAction_createRawSql_deps :: forall b_a4Fe9. Traversal' (CreateAction b_a4Fe9) [Ref Table]
createAction_createRawSql_blacklistDeps :: forall b_a4Fe9. Traversal' (CreateAction b_a4Fe9) [Ref Table]
allSpecsTables :: Specs b -> [Ref Table]

-- | Rename all napkin-managed tables in the `Specs b`.
namespaceTables :: forall b. (Ref Table -> Ref Table) -> Specs b -> Specs b

-- | Apply a renamer to all tables in the `Specs b` (managed or unmanaged).
namespaceAllTables :: forall b. (Ref Table -> Ref Table) -> Specs b -> Specs b
namespaceFunctions :: forall b. (Ref Function -> Ref Function) -> Specs b -> Specs b

-- | Set the same <a>Grant</a> permissions for all tables defined in the
--   spec at once. Convenience function for a common use case. Acts
--   monadically, so it will apply to all specs so far defined in the
--   <a>Spec</a> block.
setAllTableGrants :: MonadState (Specs b) m => [([Privilege], [Actor])] -> m ()
data SpecRunConstructor v_a4H5x
SpecRunConstructor :: SpecRunConstructor v_a4H5x
migrateDb :: PersistBackend m => m ()

-- | zlib compresses sagecopy blob
safeCopy :: SafeCopy a => Prism' ByteString a
specDeps :: TableSpec b -> [Ref Table]

-- | add dependencies to CreateRawSql actions
preprocessDependencies :: (MonadIO m, ParseSQL b) => b -> Specs b -> m (Specs b)
prettyQueryStats :: QueryStats -> String
instance Database.Groundhog.Core.Constructor Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecRunConstructor
instance Database.Groundhog.Core.PersistEntity Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecRun
instance Database.Groundhog.Core.PersistField (Database.Groundhog.Core.Key Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecRun Database.Groundhog.Core.BackendSpecific)
instance Database.Groundhog.Core.PrimitivePersistField (Database.Groundhog.Core.Key Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecRun Database.Groundhog.Core.BackendSpecific)
instance Database.Groundhog.Core.PurePersistField (Database.Groundhog.Core.Key Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecRun Database.Groundhog.Core.BackendSpecific)
instance Database.Groundhog.Core.SinglePersistField (Database.Groundhog.Core.Key Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecRun Database.Groundhog.Core.BackendSpecific)
instance GHC.Classes.Eq (Database.Groundhog.Core.Key Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecRun a)
instance GHC.Show.Show (Database.Groundhog.Core.Key Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecRun a)
instance GHC.Read.Read (Database.Groundhog.Core.Key Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecRun Database.Groundhog.Core.BackendSpecific)
instance Database.Groundhog.Core.PersistField Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecRun
instance Database.Groundhog.Core.SinglePersistField Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecRun
instance Database.Groundhog.Core.NeverNull Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecRun
instance Napkin.Types.TableRef (Napkin.Spec.Types.TableSpec b)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Napkin.Spec.Types.UpdateStrategy
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Spec.Types.UpdateStrategy
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Spec.Types.UpdateStrategy
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.Types.UpdateStrategy
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Spec.Types.UpdateStrategy
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Napkin.Spec.Types.TableStatus
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Spec.Types.TableStatus
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.Types.TableStatus
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Spec.Types.TableStatus
instance Control.Monad.Catch.MonadThrow (Napkin.Spec.Types.Spec b)
instance Control.Monad.Catch.MonadCatch (Napkin.Spec.Types.Spec b)
instance Control.Monad.Catch.MonadMask (Napkin.Spec.Types.Spec b)
instance Control.Monad.State.Class.MonadState (Napkin.Spec.Types.Specs b) (Napkin.Spec.Types.Spec b)
instance Control.Monad.IO.Class.MonadIO (Napkin.Spec.Types.Spec b)
instance GHC.Base.Monad (Napkin.Spec.Types.Spec b)
instance GHC.Base.Applicative (Napkin.Spec.Types.Spec b)
instance GHC.Base.Functor (Napkin.Spec.Types.Spec b)
instance (GHC.Show.Show b, GHC.Show.Show (Napkin.Types.Commands.BackendTableMeta b)) => GHC.Show.Show (Napkin.Spec.Types.TableSpec b)
instance (GHC.Show.Show b, GHC.Show.Show (Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecTableMap b)) => GHC.Show.Show (Napkin.Spec.Types.Specs b)
instance Napkin.Spec.Types.HasSpec (Napkin.Spec.Types.Specs bk) bk
instance Napkin.Spec.Types.HasSpec (Napkin.Spec.Types.Spec bk a) bk
instance GHC.Show.Show (Napkin.Spec.Types.Spec b a)
instance Data.Default.Class.Default (Napkin.Spec.Types.Specs b)
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON (Napkin.Spec.Types.TableSpec b)
instance Katip.Core.ToObject (Napkin.Spec.Types.TableSpec b)
instance Katip.Core.LogItem (Napkin.Spec.Types.TableSpec b)
instance GHC.Show.Show (Napkin.Spec.Types.CreateAction b)
instance GHC.Base.Semigroup Napkin.Spec.Types.QueryTransformer
instance GHC.Base.Monoid Napkin.Spec.Types.QueryTransformer
instance Database.Groundhog.Core.PrimitivePersistField (Napkin.Types.Ref a)
instance Database.Groundhog.Core.PersistField (Napkin.Types.Ref a)
instance Database.Groundhog.Core.SinglePersistField (Napkin.Types.Ref a)
instance Database.Groundhog.Core.PurePersistField (Napkin.Types.Ref a)
instance Database.Groundhog.Core.NeverNull (Napkin.Types.Ref a)
instance (GHC.Show.Show a, GHC.Read.Read a) => Database.Groundhog.Core.PrimitivePersistField (Napkin.Spec.Types.Showing a)
instance (GHC.Show.Show a, GHC.Read.Read a) => Database.Groundhog.Core.PersistField (Napkin.Spec.Types.Showing a)
instance (GHC.Show.Show a, GHC.Read.Read a) => Database.Groundhog.Core.SinglePersistField (Napkin.Spec.Types.Showing a)
instance (GHC.Show.Show a, GHC.Read.Read a) => Database.Groundhog.Core.PurePersistField (Napkin.Spec.Types.Showing a)
instance Database.Groundhog.Core.NeverNull (Napkin.Spec.Types.Showing a)
instance Database.Groundhog.Core.PrimitivePersistField Napkin.Spec.Types.Pipeline
instance Database.Groundhog.Core.PersistField Napkin.Spec.Types.Pipeline
instance Database.Groundhog.Core.NeverNull Napkin.Spec.Types.Pipeline
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Napkin.Spec.Types.Pipeline
instance Data.String.IsString Napkin.Spec.Types.Pipeline
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Napkin.Spec.Types.Pipeline
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Napkin.Spec.Types.Pipeline
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Spec.Types.Pipeline
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Spec.Types.Pipeline
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Spec.Types.Pipeline
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.Types.Pipeline
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Spec.Types.Pipeline
instance Data.Data.Data a => Data.Data.Data (Napkin.Spec.Types.Showing a)
instance GHC.Classes.Ord a => GHC.Classes.Ord (Napkin.Spec.Types.Showing a)
instance GHC.Read.Read a => GHC.Read.Read (Napkin.Spec.Types.Showing a)
instance GHC.Show.Show a => GHC.Show.Show (Napkin.Spec.Types.Showing a)
instance GHC.Classes.Eq a => GHC.Classes.Eq (Napkin.Spec.Types.Showing a)
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecRun
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecRun
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecRun
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecRun
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecState
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecState
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecState
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecState
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecState
instance Data.Data.Data Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecTarget
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecTarget
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecTarget
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecTarget
instance GHC.Show.Show b => GHC.Show.Show (Napkin.Spec.Types.Hook b)
instance Data.Default.Class.Default Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecState
instance Data.Default.Class.Default Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecRun
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecRun
instance Katip.Core.ToObject Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecRun
instance Katip.Core.LogItem Napkin.Spec.Types.SpecRun
instance GHC.Show.Show a => Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON (Napkin.Spec.Types.Showing a)
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON (Napkin.Types.Ref a)

module Napkin.Spec.Graph
type IncludeUnmanagedTables = Bool
tableSpecsAsDependencyGraph :: Specs b -> IncludeUnmanagedTables -> SpecDepGraph
findCycles :: Specs b -> [[Ref Table]]

module Napkin.Spec.Combo
type MonadCombo m = (MonadFix m, MonadBaseControl IO m, MonadIO m, MonadMask m, MonadFail m)

-- | For debugging; not used in prod.
runCombo :: (MonadBaseControl IO m, MonadIO m, MonadThrow m) => ComboT m b -> m b
runComboWith :: Monad m => ComboEnv -> ComboT m a -> m a
runComboStatsWith :: Monad m => ComboEnv -> ComboT m a -> m (a, TrackingQueryStats)

-- | For debugging; not used in prod.
mkComboEnv :: (MonadThrow m, MonadBaseControl IO m, MonadIO m) => m ComboEnv

-- | For debugging; spec.yaml is not used in prod and completely
--   disregarded. Prod currently uses the CLI to capture configuration
--   info.
mkAppConfig :: (MonadIO m, MonadThrow m) => m AppConfig
mkLogEnv :: (MonadBaseControl IO m, MonadIO m) => AppConfig -> m LogEnv
mkComboEnvWith :: (MonadBaseControl IO m, MonadIO m) => AppConfig -> m ComboEnv
eventQueueSize :: Natural

-- | Run a groundhog action within a Combo stack.
cGH :: (MonadReader ComboEnv m, MonadIO m, MonadBaseControl IO m) => Action Sqlite b -> m b

module Napkin.Spec.CliReporter
data TableState
Pending :: TableState
Processing :: TableState
Skipped :: TableState
Done :: TableState
Failed :: TableState

-- | Unique names for user interface elements necessary for brick.
data UIName
SpecListViewport :: UIName
SpecListView :: UIName
data PreviousStates
PreviousStates :: Maybe ElapsedSeconds -> Maybe ElapsedSeconds -> Maybe String -> PreviousStates
[_previousStates_processingTime] :: PreviousStates -> Maybe ElapsedSeconds
[_previousStates_finishedTime] :: PreviousStates -> Maybe ElapsedSeconds
[_previousStates_info] :: PreviousStates -> Maybe String
freshPreviousStates :: PreviousStates
prevStatesFinishedTime :: PreviousStates -> Maybe ElapsedSeconds
type ElapsedSeconds = Integer
type TableStates = Map String (TableState, PreviousStates)
data DrawState
DrawState :: UTCTime -> TableStates -> ElapsedSeconds -> ElapsedSeconds -> Bool -> Bool -> ElapsedSeconds -> TrackingQueryStats -> DrawState
[startTime] :: DrawState -> UTCTime
[tableStates] :: DrawState -> TableStates
[elapsedTime] :: DrawState -> ElapsedSeconds
[processingTime] :: DrawState -> ElapsedSeconds
[runDone] :: DrawState -> Bool
[wantsToQuit] :: DrawState -> Bool
[eta] :: DrawState -> ElapsedSeconds
[trackingQueryStats] :: DrawState -> TrackingQueryStats

-- | True iff all tables have been serviced so that the elapsed time can
--   stop ticking.
allTablesProcessed :: TableStates -> Bool
type TableName = String
type ErrorInfo = String
type SuccessInfo = String
data UpdateEvent
TableProcessingEvent :: TableName -> UpdateEvent
TableDoneEvent :: TableName -> TrackingQueryStats -> UpdateEvent
TableFailedEvent :: TableName -> ErrorInfo -> UpdateEvent
TableSkippedEvent :: TableName -> UpdateEvent
RunDone :: TrackingQueryStats -> UpdateEvent
FinishFatal :: UpdateEvent
Tick :: UpdateEvent
eventHandler :: DrawState -> BrickEvent UIName UpdateEvent -> EventM UIName (Next DrawState)

-- | Pump the runtime event queue to display Spec execution progress in the
--   terminal. Returns after all Specs are completed.
cliReporter :: RuntimeEventQueue -> [String] -> ElapsedSeconds -> IO Success
success :: DrawState -> Success
prettyElapsedTime :: Integer -> String
printFinalReport :: DrawState -> IO ()
filterByState :: (TableState -> Bool) -> TableStates -> TableStates
drawScreen :: DrawState -> [Widget UIName]
prettyUTCTime :: UTCTime -> String
data TableStateLine
TableStateLine :: String -> TableState -> PreviousStates -> TableStateLine
sortedStatesList :: TableStates -> [TableStateLine]
renderOneState :: ElapsedSeconds -> TableStateLine -> Widget UIName
cliAttrMap :: AttrMap
successStateLine :: AttrName
failureStateLine :: AttrName
processingStateLine :: AttrName
pendingStateLine :: AttrName
introBox :: AttrName
napkinText :: [String]
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.CliReporter.TableState
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Spec.CliReporter.TableState
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.CliReporter.UIName
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Spec.CliReporter.UIName
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Spec.CliReporter.UIName
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.CliReporter.UpdateEvent
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Spec.CliReporter.UpdateEvent

module Napkin.Cli.Run.Types
data RunCommandOptions
RunCommandOptions :: FilePath -> Maybe FilePath -> Maybe FilePath -> Bool -> Bool -> [Ref Table] -> [Ref Table] -> Bool -> Maybe Severity -> Bool -> [ByteString] -> [TableSpecTag] -> [TableSpecTag] -> Maybe String -> [FilePath] -> Maybe FilePath -> RunCommandOptions
[runCommandOptions_specFile] :: RunCommandOptions -> FilePath
[runCommandOptions_sqlDirectory] :: RunCommandOptions -> Maybe FilePath
[runCommandOptions_credentialsFile] :: RunCommandOptions -> Maybe FilePath
[runCommandOptions_disableAll] :: RunCommandOptions -> Bool
[runCommandOptions_enableAll] :: RunCommandOptions -> Bool
[runCommandOptions_forceTables] :: RunCommandOptions -> [Ref Table]
[runCommandOptions_skipTables] :: RunCommandOptions -> [Ref Table]
[runCommandOptions_showProgress] :: RunCommandOptions -> Bool
[runCommandOptions_logLevel] :: RunCommandOptions -> Maybe Severity
[runCommandOptions_dryRun] :: RunCommandOptions -> Bool
[runCommandOptions_meta] :: RunCommandOptions -> [ByteString]
[runCommandOptions_enableTags] :: RunCommandOptions -> [TableSpecTag]
[runCommandOptions_disableTags] :: RunCommandOptions -> [TableSpecTag]
[runCommandOptions_connectionURL] :: RunCommandOptions -> Maybe String
[runCommandOptions_extraPackageDbs] :: RunCommandOptions -> [FilePath]
[runCommandOptions_sqlite] :: RunCommandOptions -> Maybe FilePath
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Cli.Run.Types.RunCommandOptions
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Cli.Run.Types.RunCommandOptions

module Napkin.Spec.Persist
loadSpecState :: PersistBackend m => Pipeline -> m SpecState
srLastRun :: Traversal' SpecRun UTCTime
srDepChain :: Traversal' SpecRun DepChain
type SpecRunId = Int
newSpecRunId :: PersistBackend m => m SpecRunId

-- | Do a run, recording the instance in the database. Return the recorded
--   instance along with the run results.
recordedRun :: PersistBackend m => Pipeline -> SpecRunId -> Ref Table -> DepChain -> (forall b. m b -> ComboT IO b) -> ComboT IO a -> ComboT IO (Either SomeException a, SpecRun)
expectedRuntimeForGraph :: PersistBackend m => SpecDepGraph -> m Int
longestPathLength :: Real b => Gr a b -> Node -> Node -> b
averageTotalRuntime :: PersistBackend m => m Int
collect :: (Ord k, Foldable t) => (a -> k) -> (a -> v) -> (v -> v -> v) -> t a -> Map k v

module Napkin.Run.Composite

-- | Drop table if exists and re-create
recreate :: (Drop a c, Katip m, Command c t1 b, Command a t2 b, MonadQueryStats m) => BackendConn b -> a -> m ()
recreateView :: (Katip m, TableRef c, Command DropView t1 b, Command c t2 b, MonadQueryStats m) => BackendConn b -> c -> m ()
recreateSwap :: (Command RenameTable a backend, Command create a2 backend, Command drop a1 backend, Drop create drop, TableRef create, MonadQueryStats f, Katip f) => BackendConn backend -> create -> (Ref Table -> f ()) -> f ()

-- | Either create the table or incrementally add to it based on a
--   timestamp column.
incrementalInsert :: (Katip m, Command CheckTableExists Bool b, Command (CreateTableAs meta) t1 b, Command InsertIntoQuery t1 b, Command DeleteFrom t2 b, MonadQueryStats m, Command DropTable t3 b) => BackendConn b -> (Day -> IO (CreateTableAs meta)) -> (Day -> SExp) -> Day -> Integer -> m ()

-- | Make a cutoff predicated from a column name for a date
mkDeleteCutoff :: Ref SExp -> Day -> SExp

-- | Read local sql file with a {{cutoff}} mustache variable available
readSqlFileWithCutoff :: forall b m. (RenderSql SExp b, MonadIO m, ParseSQL b) => b -> FilePath -> SqlTemplateVariables -> Day -> m Query
incrementalInsertByPK :: (Command InsertIntoQuery a backend, Command CheckTableExists Bool backend, Command (CreateTableAs m1) a backend, MonadQueryStats m, Katip m) => BackendConn backend -> (SExp -> CreateTableAs m1) -> SExp -> SExp -> Integer -> m ()

-- | Turn a create query into an incremental insert into query.
ctaToIncrementalInsertByPK :: MonadIO m => (SExp -> CreateTableAs m1) -> SExp -> Integer -> m InsertIntoQuery

module Napkin.Spec
type Distinct = Bool
data HookAssertionError
HookAssertionError :: [Relation] -> String -> HookAssertionError

-- | <a>CustomValidator</a>s are run before namespacing and return a list
--   of errors in the incoming Spec.
type CustomValidator = SpecMetaArgs -> Ref Table -> Maybe FilePath -> Query -> [String]
data ValidationError
CycleDetectedError :: [[Ref Table]] -> ValidationError
MissingSQLFileError :: Ref Table -> FilePath -> ValidationError
SQLParseError :: String -> Ref Table -> ValidationError
UndeclaredDependenciesError :: Ref Table -> [Ref Table] -> ValidationError
ExtraneousDependenciesError :: Ref Table -> [Ref Table] -> ValidationError
CustomValidatorError :: String -> ValidationError
CustomPreprocessorError :: String -> ValidationError
YamlError :: String -> ValidationError
HaskellInterpreterError :: InterpreterError -> ValidationError
type IsInteractive = Bool
data CmdError
CmdError :: Int -> Text -> CmdError

-- | Exit code
[cmdError_code] :: CmdError -> Int
[cmdError_stderrExcerpt] :: CmdError -> Text

-- | How should cmd behave if the command exits with a failure
data CmdFailureBehavior

-- | Log the process' stderr and throw an exception, interrupting the spec
ThrowOnFailure :: CmdFailureBehavior

-- | Log the process' stderr but do not throw an exception, allowing the
--   spec to continue
LogOnFailure :: CmdFailureBehavior
type DependencySet = Set (Ref Table)

-- | What we seem to need to be able to call <a>executeSpec</a>; it's
--   basically all about choosing a backend that satisfies the needed
--   operations.
type SpecBackend bk drop t1 t2 t3 t4 t5 t6 t7 = (Command CreateViewAs t3 bk, Command CheckTableExists Bool bk, Command Grant t1 bk, Command (CreateTableAs (BackendTableMeta bk)) t4 bk, Command InsertIntoQuery t6 bk, Command drop t5 bk, Command DropView t2 bk, Command RenameTable t7 bk, Drop (CreateTableAs (BackendTableMeta bk)) drop, Default (BackendTableMeta bk), RenderSql (Ref Table) bk, RenderSql Query bk, RenderSql SExp bk, ReplaceReference bk)
newtype SpecOpts
SpecOpts :: Bool -> SpecOpts
[_spDry] :: SpecOpts -> Bool
data SpecRuntime b
SpecRuntime :: Pipeline -> BackendConn b -> SpecRuntime b
[_spPipeline] :: SpecRuntime b -> Pipeline
[_spConn] :: SpecRuntime b -> BackendConn b

-- | shorthand for starting specs, use lenses to then update parts
spec :: Ref Table -> Maybe (BackendTableMeta b) -> TableSpec b
ctaToSpec :: CreateTableAs (BackendTableMeta b) -> TableSpec b
cvaToSpec :: CreateViewAs -> TableSpec b

-- | Split UNION queries and insert each individually.
splitIfUnion :: TableSpec b0 -> TableSpec b0

-- | Split a top level UNION based query table definition into individual
--   insert-based queries in chunks of n.
splitIfUnionBy :: Int -> TableSpec b0 -> TableSpec b0
specIncrementalByPK :: (Command CheckTableExists Bool b0, Command InsertIntoQuery a b0, Command (CreateTableAs (BackendTableMeta b0)) a b0) => (SExp -> CreateTableAs (BackendTableMeta b0)) -> SExp -> SExp -> Integer -> TableSpec b0
specIncrementalByTime :: (MonadIO m, Command (CreateTableAs (BackendTableMeta b)) t1 b, Command CheckTableExists Bool b, Command InsertIntoQuery t1 b, Command DeleteFrom t2 b, Command DropTable t3 b, Command RenameTable t4 b, Drop (CreateTableAs (BackendTableMeta b)) DropTable) => (Day -> IO (CreateTableAs (BackendTableMeta b))) -> (Day -> SExp) -> Day -> Integer -> [Ref Table] -> m (TableSpec b)
specIncrementalByTimeCreateAction :: (MonadIO m, Katip m, MonadQueryStats m, Command (CreateTableAs (BackendTableMeta b)) t1 b, Command CheckTableExists Bool b, Command InsertIntoQuery t1 b, Command DeleteFrom t2 b, Command DropTable t3 b, Command RenameTable t4 b, Drop (CreateTableAs (BackendTableMeta b)) DropTable) => (Day -> IO (CreateTableAs (BackendTableMeta b))) -> Day -> (Day -> SExp) -> Integer -> TableStatus -> QueryTransformer -> SpecMetaArgs -> BackendConn b -> m ()
specIncrementalByTimeRawSql :: (MonadIO m, RenderSql SExp b, Default (BackendTableMeta b), Command (CreateTableAs (BackendTableMeta b)) t1 b, Command CheckTableExists Bool b, Command InsertIntoQuery t1 b, Command DeleteFrom t2 b, Command DropTable t3 b, Command RenameTable t4 b, Drop (CreateTableAs (BackendTableMeta b)) DropTable, ParseSQL b) => b -> Ref Table -> Maybe (BackendTableMeta b) -> [Ref Table] -> FilePath -> SqlTemplateVariables -> Ref SExp -> Day -> Integer -> m (TableSpec b)

-- | Read a file that contains raw SQL query code that can be used to
--   instantiate a table.
rawSqlSpec :: Ref Table -> Maybe (BackendTableMeta b) -> FilePath -> SpecTarget -> [Ref Table] -> Spec b (TableSpec b)

-- | Same as <a>rawSqlSpec</a> but allows for mustache templating inside of
--   the raw SQL file.
rawSqlMustacheSpec :: Ref Table -> Maybe (BackendTableMeta b) -> FilePath -> SqlTemplateVariables -> SpecTarget -> [Ref Table] -> Spec b (TableSpec b)

-- | Query the "long" version of the table to determine what columns to put
--   in the "wide" version. This function does not support mustache
--   templates.
longToWideAutoSpec :: (Backend b, SpecBackend b drop t1 t2 t3 t4 t5 t6 t7) => Ref Table -> Ref Table -> [Alias SExp] -> Ref SExp -> Ref SExp -> (Value -> Ref SExp) -> Maybe (BackendTableMeta b) -> SpecTarget -> [Ref Table] -> Spec b (TableSpec b)

-- | A basic means of generating new column names from
simpleValueAsColumnName :: Ref SExp -> Value -> Ref SExp

-- | A custom Spec which runs a command processed with mustache with the
--   metaargs dictionary.
commandSpec :: Command CheckTableExists Bool b => Ref Table -> String -> [String] -> [Ref Table] -> Spec b (TableSpec b)

-- | Specialized convenience for UNION-ing several tables and queries, even
--   for cases where the list of fields available in each table is not
--   known at compile time. This will introspect list of fields for cases
--   where a bare table name is given instead of a <a>QueryRelation</a>.
combineTablesSpec :: (SpecBackend bk drop t1 t2 t3 t4 t5 t6 t7, Command GetRelationSchema (Fields Field) bk) => Ref Table -> Maybe (BackendTableMeta bk) -> SpecTarget -> (Query -> Query) -> [Relation] -> TableSpec bk
defineTable :: TableSpec b -> Spec b ()

-- | Ridiculous convenience so some users don't have to bind themselves
defineTableM :: Spec b (TableSpec b) -> Spec b ()
addHooks :: [([Ref Table], Hook b)] -> Spec b ()
addTags :: [TableSpecTag] -> Spec b () -> Spec b ()

-- | Should I be running the update?
checkUpdateStrategy :: TableSpec b -> TableStatus -> UpdateStrategy -> IO Bool

-- | Return the set difference of the dependencies of second set from the
--   first set, paying attention to BigQuery's <a>*</a> table name syntax.
diffDependencies :: Bool -> DependencySet -> DependencySet -> DependencySet

-- | Return True if the asterisk Ref matches the second table's name.
asteriskRefMatch :: Ref Table -> Ref Table -> Bool
asteriskExpand :: Ref Table -> DependencySet -> DependencySet
executeSpec :: forall m s bk drop t1 t2 t3 t4 t5 t6 t7. (MonadFix m, MonadBaseControl IO m, MonadMask m, Katip m, HasSpec s bk, ParseSQL bk, MonadReader ComboEnv m, SpecBackend bk drop t1 t2 t3 t4 t5 t6 t7, Backend bk, MonadQueryStats m) => bk -> SpecRuntime bk -> SpecOpts -> CustomValidator -> s -> m Success

-- | A run that succeeds immediately without ever actually running
--   anything.
dryRun :: (MonadIO m, Katip m) => Pipeline -> Ref Table -> DepChain -> t -> m (Either a (), SpecRun)
recreateStandard :: forall b t1 t2 t4 t5 t6 c f d. (Command CreateViewAs t2 b, Command DropView t1 b, Command (CreateTableAs d) t4 b, Command RenameTable t6 b, Drop (CreateTableAs d) c, Command c t5 b, Katip f, BackendTableMeta b ~ d, Default d, MonadQueryStats f) => BackendConn b -> Ref Table -> Maybe (BackendTableMeta b) -> Query -> SpecTarget -> (Ref Table -> f ()) -> f ()
dryExecute :: (LogItem a, Katip m) => t -> a -> m ()

-- | Combinator for use in things spec hooks to shell out to a command. The
--   command being run will be logged, and on error the stderr will be
--   trimmed and logged. When ThrowOnFailure is passed, a <a>CmdError</a>
--   will be thrown.
cmd :: (Katip m, MonadThrow m) => CmdFailureBehavior -> String -> [String] -> m ()
reportFatalError :: Maybe RuntimeEventQueue -> IO ()

-- | Report runtime updates as the Spec execution progresses.
reportProgress :: Show a => Maybe RuntimeEventQueue -> Ref Table -> ComboT IO (Either a b, SpecRun) -> ComboT IO (Either a b, SpecRun)
reportCompletion :: MonadIO m => Maybe RuntimeEventQueue -> TrackingQueryStats -> m ()
reportSkipUpdate :: MonadIO m => Maybe RuntimeEventQueue -> Ref Table -> m ()
emptyValidator :: CustomValidator

-- | Run basic checks against all Specs and convert every raw query to
--   normal Query.
validateAndPreprocessSpecs :: (MonadIO m, ParseSQL bk) => bk -> CustomValidator -> Specs b -> m (Either [ValidationError] (Specs b))
validateDependencies :: Ref Table -> Query -> [Ref Table] -> [Ref Table] -> ([ValidationError], [Ref Table])
diffRowCountsError :: (Relation, Integer) -> (Relation, Integer) -> HookAssertionError
greaterThanCountsError :: (Relation, Integer) -> (Relation, Integer) -> HookAssertionError
greaterThanConstantError :: (Relation, Integer) -> (Relation, Integer) -> HookAssertionError
uniquenessError :: (Relation, Integer) -> Integer -> SExp -> [Ref a] -> HookAssertionError
runHook :: forall backend. (Backend backend, RenderSql Query backend, RenderSql SExp backend) => BackendConn backend -> Hook backend -> ComboT IO ()
countCompare :: (Backend backend, RenderSql Query backend) => BackendConn backend -> Relation -> Relation -> (Integer -> Integer -> Bool) -> ((Relation, Integer) -> (Relation, Integer) -> HookAssertionError) -> ComboT IO ()
tableCount :: Distinct -> Relation -> Query
runRelationCount :: (Backend bk, RenderSql Query bk) => BackendConn bk -> Distinct -> Relation -> ComboT IO Integer
assertNotAllNull :: SExp -> Relation -> Hook b
prettyQueryStatsForTable :: Ref Table -> TrackingQueryStats -> String

-- | Process any raw queries within a Query with the renamer.
processNamespaceQuery :: ParseSQL b => b -> QueryTransformer -> Query -> SqlSource -> IO Query
logFinalReport :: (Katip m, RenderSql (Ref Table) bk, MonadQueryStats m) => bk -> [(Ref Table, Either SomeException (Either b SpecRun, TrackingQueryStats))] -> [Either SomeException (Bool, TrackingQueryStats)] -> m ()

-- | create a mapping of <a>TableSpecTag</a>s to `Ref Table`s for dumping.
specTagRefMap :: [TableSpec b] -> Map (Maybe TableSpecTag) [Ref Table]
applyQueryTransformer :: QueryTransformer -> CreateAction b -> CreateAction b

blacklistDependencies :: [Ref Table] -> TableSpec b -> TableSpec b
type MonadCombo m = (MonadFix m, MonadBaseControl IO m, MonadIO m, MonadMask m, MonadFail m)
newtype SqlTemplateVariables
SqlTemplateVariables :: Map Text Value -> SqlTemplateVariables
[_sqlTemplateVariables] :: SqlTemplateVariables -> Map Text Value
sqlTemplate :: [(Text, Value)] -> SqlTemplateVariables
sqlVar :: ToJSON ω => Text -> ω -> (Text, Value)
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Spec.CmdError
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.CmdError
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.HookAssertionError
instance GHC.Exception.Type.Exception Napkin.Spec.HookAssertionError
instance GHC.Exception.Type.Exception Napkin.Spec.ValidationError
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.ValidationError
instance GHC.Exception.Type.Exception Napkin.Spec.CmdError
instance Data.Default.Class.Default Napkin.Spec.SpecOpts

module Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types
data YamlSpec
YamlSpec :: FilePath -> String -> Maybe FilePath -> [YamlTableSpec] -> YamlBackend -> Maybe YamlHaskellSymbol -> Maybe YamlHaskellSymbol -> [String] -> Maybe YamlHaskellSymbol -> YamlSpec

-- | indicate folders within project to scan for SQL and other source
--   files. By default should be <tt>sql</tt>
[_yamlSpec_sqlFolder] :: YamlSpec -> FilePath

-- | URL to indicate how to create the database connection
[_yamlSpec_connectionURL] :: YamlSpec -> String

-- | folder used to find the Haskell source code. When not provided,
--   assumed to be haskell/
[_yamlSpec_haskellFolder] :: YamlSpec -> Maybe FilePath
[_yamlSpec_tableSpecs] :: YamlSpec -> [YamlTableSpec]

-- | indicate backend to be used in this spec
[_yamlSpec_backend] :: YamlSpec -> YamlBackend

-- | specify a function to run as the napkin spec preprocessor
[_yamlSpec_specPreprocessor] :: YamlSpec -> Maybe YamlHaskellSymbol

-- | specify a function to run as the napkin validator
[_yamlSpec_validator] :: YamlSpec -> Maybe YamlHaskellSymbol

-- | specify additional packages which should be exposed to the haskell
--   functions in the YAML spec
[_yamlSpec_extraHaskellPackages] :: YamlSpec -> [String]

-- | specify an additional Haskell function to run in the Spec monad after
--   all the TableSpecs.
[_yamlSpec_haskellSpec] :: YamlSpec -> Maybe YamlHaskellSymbol

-- | We include a set of default choices user can supply, which helps us
--   disambiguate database, dataset/schema and similar choices when left
--   unspecified in SQL files.
data YamlBackend
YamlBackend_BigQuery :: Maybe YamlBigQueryDefaults -> YamlBackend
YamlBackend_Postgres :: Maybe YamlPostgresDefaults -> YamlBackend
YamlBackend_Redshift :: Maybe YamlPostgresDefaults -> YamlBackend

-- | A set of defaults that's useful to capture from the user to
--   disambiguate ad-hoc queries.
data YamlBigQueryDefaults
YamlBigQueryDefaults :: Text -> Text -> YamlBigQueryDefaults
[_yamlBigQueryDefaults_project] :: YamlBigQueryDefaults -> Text
[_yamlBigQueryDefaults_dataset] :: YamlBigQueryDefaults -> Text

-- | A set of defaults that's useful to capture from the user - allows us
--   to run SQL ambiguous in database/schema, or run without asking an
--   explicit target server from the user.
--   
--   We may also want to bake in optional defaults on username, but for now
--   I'm keeping that separate to be pulled in from authentication info
--   meant to reside separately from the spec config.
--   
--   For now, we're keeping all Postgres based cases unified. We may break
--   them out as needed in the future.
data YamlPostgresDefaults
YamlPostgresDefaults :: Text -> Text -> Text -> YamlPostgresDefaults
[_yamlPostgresDefaults_server] :: YamlPostgresDefaults -> Text
[_yamlPostgresDefaults_database] :: YamlPostgresDefaults -> Text
[_yamlPostgresDefaults_schema] :: YamlPostgresDefaults -> Text
class ToYamlBackend b
toYamlBackend :: ToYamlBackend b => YamlBackend
data YamlTableSpec
YamlTableSpec :: Ref Table -> YamlTableMeta -> YamlCreateAction -> [YamlHook] -> [YamlHook] -> [UpdateStrategy] -> [TableSpecTag] -> YamlTableSpec
[_yamlTableSpec_targetTable] :: YamlTableSpec -> Ref Table
[_yamlTableSpec_targetTableOptions] :: YamlTableSpec -> YamlTableMeta
[_yamlTableSpec_createAction] :: YamlTableSpec -> YamlCreateAction
[_yamlTableSpec_preHooks] :: YamlTableSpec -> [YamlHook]
[_yamlTableSpec_postHooks] :: YamlTableSpec -> [YamlHook]
[_yamlTableSpec_updateStrategy] :: YamlTableSpec -> [UpdateStrategy]
[_yamlTableSpec_tags] :: YamlTableSpec -> [TableSpecTag]

-- | Table options specific to each backend.
data YamlTableMeta
YamlTableMeta_BigQuery :: BackendTableMeta BigQuery -> YamlTableMeta
YamlTableMeta_Redshift :: BackendTableMeta Redshift -> YamlTableMeta
YamlTableMeta_None :: YamlTableMeta
data YamlCreateAction

-- | Create a table spec from an sql file
YamlCreateAction_Mustache :: FilePath -> SqlTemplateVariables -> [Ref Table] -> [Ref Table] -> YamlSpecTarget -> YamlCreateStrategy -> YamlCreateAction
[_yamlCreateAction_mustache_file] :: YamlCreateAction -> FilePath
[_yamlCreateAction_mustache_variables] :: YamlCreateAction -> SqlTemplateVariables
[_yamlCreateAction_mustache_deps] :: YamlCreateAction -> [Ref Table]
[_yamlCreateAction_mustache_hiddenDeps] :: YamlCreateAction -> [Ref Table]
[_yamlCreateAction_mustache_targetType] :: YamlCreateAction -> YamlSpecTarget
[_yamlCreateAction_mustache_strategy] :: YamlCreateAction -> YamlCreateStrategy

-- | Create a table spec from a Haskell function in the haskell folder
YamlCreateAction_Haskell :: YamlHaskellSymbol -> YamlSpecTarget -> YamlCreateAction
[_yamlCreateAction_haskell_symbol] :: YamlCreateAction -> YamlHaskellSymbol
[_yamlCreateAction_haskell_targetType] :: YamlCreateAction -> YamlSpecTarget
data YamlHaskellSymbol
YamlHaskellSymbol :: Text -> Text -> YamlHaskellSymbol

-- | TODO: Flesh these out for more typical use cases.
--   
--   Using generalized napkin types here; maybe we can let the user write
--   little snippets into YAML for increased power.
data YamlHook
YamlHook_AssertEqualCount :: Relation -> Relation -> YamlHook
YamlHook_AssertUniqueBy :: Relation -> [Ref SExp] -> YamlHook
YamlHook_AssertNotNull :: Relation -> [SExp] -> YamlHook
data YamlSpecTarget
YamlSpecTarget_Table :: YamlSpecTarget
YamlSpecTarget_View :: YamlSpecTarget

-- | allows selection of wrappers such as incrementalByTimeRawSql
data YamlCreateStrategy
YamlCreateStrategy_IncrementalByTime :: Ref SExp -> Day -> Integer -> YamlCreateStrategy
YamlCreateStrategy_IncrementalByPK :: YamlHaskellSymbol -> NonEmpty (Ref SExp) -> Day -> Integer -> YamlCreateStrategy
YamlCreateStrategy_Default :: YamlCreateStrategy
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlBigQueryDefaults
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlBigQueryDefaults
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlPostgresDefaults
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlPostgresDefaults
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlBackend
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlBackend
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlTableMeta
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlTableMeta
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlHaskellSymbol
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlHaskellSymbol
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlHook
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlHook
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlSpecTarget
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlSpecTarget
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlCreateStrategy
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlCreateStrategy
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlCreateAction
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlCreateAction
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlTableSpec
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlTableSpec
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlSpec
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlSpec
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlSpec
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlSpec
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlTableSpec
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlTableSpec
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlCreateAction
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlCreateAction
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlCreateStrategy
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlCreateStrategy
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlSpecTarget
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlSpecTarget
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlHook
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlHook
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlHaskellSymbol
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlHaskellSymbol
instance Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.ToYamlBackend Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BigQuery
instance Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.ToYamlBackend Napkin.Types.Postgres.Postgres
instance Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.ToYamlBackend Napkin.Types.Redshift.Redshift
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlBackend
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Types.YamlBackend
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Napkin.Spec.Types.UpdateStrategy
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Napkin.Spec.Types.UpdateStrategy
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Napkin.Untyped.SqlFile.SqlTemplateVariables
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON (Napkin.Types.Ref a)

module Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Generate
generateYAMLFromSQLDirectory :: FilePath -> YamlBackend -> IO YamlSpec

-- | Used for subsequent runs of the generate YAML feature, take an
--   existing YAML Spec and add new tablespecs and other missing info found
--   in the generated YamlSpec.
mergeYamlSpecs :: YamlSpec -> YamlSpec -> YamlSpec

module Napkin.Spec.Dump
data SqlFileType
SqlFileType_Query :: SqlFileType
SqlFileType_InsertStatement :: SqlFileType

-- | Main entrypoint into SQL directory generation.
specToSQLDir :: (RenderSql (CreateTableAs d) b, RenderSql Query b, RenderSql CreateViewAs b, ParseSQL b, BackendTableMeta b ~ d, Default d) => b -> Specs b -> IncludeUnmanagedTables -> SqlFileType -> FilePath -> IO ()
specGraphAsDot :: SpecDepGraph -> DotGraph Int
tableau10Colors :: [Color]
tableau20Colors :: [Color]
specGraphAsDotText :: SpecDepGraph -> Text
specGraphAsSQLDirectory :: (RenderSql (CreateTableAs d) b, RenderSql Query b, RenderSql CreateViewAs b, ParseSQL b, BackendTableMeta b ~ d, Default d) => b -> SpecDepGraph -> SpecTableMap b -> GenerateInserts -> FilePath -> IO ()

-- | Returns a list of SQL sources which can be used to construct the
--   database in order of dependency.
specGraphAsSQL :: (RenderSql (CreateTableAs d) b, RenderSql Query b, RenderSql CreateViewAs b, ParseSQL b, Default (BackendTableMeta b), BackendTableMeta b ~ d) => b -> SpecDepGraph -> SpecTableMap b -> GenerateInserts -> IO [(Ref Table, [String])]
type GenerateInserts = Bool

-- | Render a TableSpec using a BigQuery backend. Requires IO to perform
--   Raw SQL file reading. <a>GenerateInserts</a> can indicate whether the
--   generated SQL files should include INSERT statements. This is used for
--   breaking up BigQuery statements which would otherwise be too long to
--   execute.
renderTableSpec :: forall b d. (RenderSql Query b, RenderSql CreateViewAs b, RenderSql (CreateTableAs d) b, ParseSQL b, Default (BackendTableMeta b), BackendTableMeta b ~ d) => b -> TableSpec b -> GenerateInserts -> IO [String]
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Spec.Dump.SqlFileType
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.Dump.SqlFileType
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Spec.Dump.SqlFileType
instance Data.GraphViz.Attributes.Labellable Napkin.Spec.Graph.Types.SpecDepGraphLabel


-- | Napkin Command Line Interface, CLI
module Napkin.Spec.Cli

-- | Data structure for all CLI commnad and sub-commands.
--   
--   SubCommand data strucres are Run, Dump, ListTags, DumpDeps Each
--   SubCommands data strucures contain the available commands
data CliOptions
Run :: RunOptions -> CliOptions
Dump :: DumpOptions -> CliOptions
ListTags :: CliOptions
DumpDeps :: CliOptions

-- | User-specified function to preprocess all specs. Useful for renaming
--   all tables, for example, in development vs. production mode.
data CustomSpecPreprocessor bk
CustomSpecPreprocessor :: CustomSpecPreprocessorFunc bk -> CustomSpecPreprocessor bk
type CustomSpecPreprocessorFunc bk = SpecMetaArgs -> [(SpecRuntime bk, Specs bk)] -> [(SpecRuntime bk, Specs bk)]

-- | The default preprocessor which makes no changes to the specs.
emptyPreprocessor :: CustomSpecPreprocessor bk

-- | Data structure dump sub-command.
data DumpOptions
DumpOptions :: FilePath -> Bool -> Bool -> [ByteString] -> Bool -> DumpOptions
[$sel:_dumpOptions_outputDirectory:DumpOptions] :: DumpOptions -> FilePath
[$sel:_dumpOptions_force:DumpOptions] :: DumpOptions -> Bool
[$sel:_dumpOptions_generateInserts:DumpOptions] :: DumpOptions -> Bool
[$sel:_dumpOptions_meta:DumpOptions] :: DumpOptions -> [ByteString]
[$sel:_dumpOptions_excludeUnmanagedTables:DumpOptions] :: DumpOptions -> Bool
parseFilePath :: ReadM FilePath
parseMeta :: ReadM ByteString

-- | Data structure run sub-command.
data RunOptions
RunOptions :: Bool -> Bool -> Bool -> [Ref Table] -> [Ref Table] -> [Ref Table] -> [Pipeline] -> Text -> Maybe Severity -> Bool -> Maybe Text -> Maybe FilePath -> Bool -> [ByteString] -> [TableSpecTag] -> [TableSpecTag] -> RunOptions
[$sel:_runOptions_disableAll:RunOptions] :: RunOptions -> Bool
[$sel:_runOptions_enableAll:RunOptions] :: RunOptions -> Bool
[$sel:_runOptions_depsOnly:RunOptions] :: RunOptions -> Bool
[$sel:_runOptions_forceTables:RunOptions] :: RunOptions -> [Ref Table]
[$sel:_runOptions_skipTables:RunOptions] :: RunOptions -> [Ref Table]
[$sel:_runOptions_naturalUpdates:RunOptions] :: RunOptions -> [Ref Table]
[$sel:_runOptions_specSets:RunOptions] :: RunOptions -> [Pipeline]
[$sel:_runOptions_app:RunOptions] :: RunOptions -> Text
[$sel:_runOptions_logLevel:RunOptions] :: RunOptions -> Maybe Severity
[$sel:_runOptions_dryRun:RunOptions] :: RunOptions -> Bool
[$sel:_runOptions_namespace:RunOptions] :: RunOptions -> Maybe Text
[$sel:_runOptions_sqlite:RunOptions] :: RunOptions -> Maybe FilePath
[$sel:_runOptions_showProgress:RunOptions] :: RunOptions -> Bool
[$sel:_runOptions_meta:RunOptions] :: RunOptions -> [ByteString]
[$sel:_runOptions_enableTags:RunOptions] :: RunOptions -> [TableSpecTag]
[$sel:_runOptions_disableTags:RunOptions] :: RunOptions -> [TableSpecTag]
parseRefTable :: ReadM (Ref Table)
parseLogLevel :: ReadM Severity

-- | Parser for the <tt>run</tt> CLI sub-command
--   
--   Parses available commands for the <tt>run</tt> sub-command and
--   provides detail CLI help text
parseRunOptions :: Parser CliOptions

-- | Parser for the <tt>dump</tt> CLI sub-command
--   
--   Parses available commands for the <tt>run</tt> sub-command and
--   provides detail CLI help text
parseDumpOptions :: Parser CliOptions
parseCliOption :: Parser CliOptions
parseSpecMetaArgs :: [ByteString] -> Either String SpecMetaArgs
dumpDeps :: ParseSQL bk => (AppConfig -> ResourceT IO ComboEnv) -> bk -> [(SpecRuntime bk, Spec bk a)] -> IO ()

-- | Compile given list of specs into ready to execute form.
compileSpecs :: MonadIO m => [(t, Spec b a)] -> m [(t, Specs b)]

-- | Use this to make your <tt>main</tt> entry point for your spec running
--   application. specMain :: bk -&gt; [(NS.SpecRuntime bk, NST.Spec bk
--   ())] -&gt; IO ()
specMain :: (SpecBackend bk drop t1 t2 t3 t4 t5 t6 t7, RenderSql (CreateTableAs (BackendTableMeta bk)) bk, RenderSql CreateViewAs bk, ParseSQL bk, Backend bk) => bk -> [(SpecRuntime bk, Spec bk a)] -> IO ExitCode

-- | A more customizable specMain for embedding in larger programs. This
--   API is unstable
specMainWith :: forall bk drop t1 t2 t3 t4 t5 t6 t7 a. (SpecBackend bk drop t1 t2 t3 t4 t5 t6 t7, RenderSql (CreateTableAs (BackendTableMeta bk)) bk, RenderSql CreateViewAs bk, ParseSQL bk, Backend bk) => (AppConfig -> ResourceT IO ComboEnv) -> CliOptions -> bk -> CustomSpecPreprocessor bk -> CustomValidator -> [(SpecRuntime bk, Spec bk a)] -> IO ExitCode
exitRunFailed :: ExitCode
exitValidationFailed :: ExitCode
allocComboEnv :: AppConfig -> ResourceT IO ComboEnv
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Spec.Cli.DumpOptions
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.Cli.DumpOptions
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Spec.Cli.RunOptions
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.Cli.RunOptions
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Spec.Cli.CliOptions
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.Cli.CliOptions

module Napkin.Run.PGCommon
data Named a
Named :: Text -> a -> Named a
[_namedName] :: Named a -> Text
[_namedItem] :: Named a -> a
namedMap :: [Named a] -> Map Text a
class HasPostgresConn a
getPostgresConn :: HasPostgresConn a => BackendConn a -> Pool Connection
executeCommand :: (Katip m, RenderSql a backend, CommandDescr a backend, HasPostgresConn backend) => backend -> BackendConn backend -> a -> m Int64
query :: (Katip m, RenderSql q b, HasPostgresConn b) => b -> BackendConn b -> q -> m [Map Text Value]
execute :: (Katip m, RenderSql a1 b, HasPostgresConn a2) => b -> BackendConn a2 -> a1 -> m Int64

-- | Check if table<i>view</i>relation exists. Schema is inferred if Ref
--   contains multiple segments.
checkTableExists :: (Katip f, HasPostgresConn bk, RenderSql Query bk) => bk -> BackendConn bk -> Ref Table -> f Bool

-- | Check if table<i>view</i>relation exists in given schema.
--   
--   
--   <a>http://stackoverflow.com/questions/20582500/how-to-check-if-a-table-exists-in-a-given-schema</a>
qry_checkTable :: String -> String -> Q ()

-- | Introspect schema of a <a>Relation</a>
relationSchema :: (Katip f, HasPostgresConn bk, Command DropView t0 bk, RenderSql DropView bk, Command CreateViewAs t1 bk, CommandDescr DropView bk, MonadQueryStats f) => bk -> BackendConn bk -> Relation -> f (Fields Field)
refFqTable :: Ref a -> FQTable
instance GHC.Classes.Ord a => GHC.Classes.Ord (Napkin.Run.PGCommon.Named a)
instance GHC.Read.Read a => GHC.Read.Read (Napkin.Run.PGCommon.Named a)
instance GHC.Show.Show a => GHC.Show.Show (Napkin.Run.PGCommon.Named a)
instance GHC.Classes.Eq a => GHC.Classes.Eq (Napkin.Run.PGCommon.Named a)
instance Database.PostgreSQL.Simple.FromField.FromField (Napkin.Run.PGCommon.Named Napkin.Types.Value)
instance Database.PostgreSQL.Simple.FromRow.FromRow (Data.Map.Internal.Map Data.Text.Internal.Text Napkin.Types.Value)

module Napkin.Run.Redshift

-- | The Redshift monad transformer that all the redshift API operations
--   run in. This monad ensures that all tunnels get a unique port on
--   localhost.
data RedshiftT (m :: Type -> Type) a

-- | Establish a postgresql-simple connection to a RedshiftDB.
connectRedshift :: forall (m :: Type -> Type). MonadIO m => RedshiftDB -> Int -> NominalDiffTime -> Int -> RedshiftT m (Pool Connection)

-- | Runs any DB action in IO.
--   
--   The only way to unwrap RedshiftT, as we need to carefully manage SSH
--   tunnels and database connections.
runRedshift :: MonadIO m => RedshiftState -> RedshiftT m a -> m a

-- | A default RedshiftState that cleans up and is not verbose. If you
--   store your keys in ~/.aws-keys you can use <a>baseConfiguration</a>
--   for the configuration parameter
defRS :: Configuration -> RedshiftState

-- | Retrieves a RedshiftDB for the specified DB nickname.
redNick :: String -> IO RedshiftDB
withRedshift :: String -> Int -> NominalDiffTime -> Int -> (BackendConn Redshift -> IO b) -> IO b
withPostgresString :: String -> (BackendConn Redshift -> IO b) -> IO b
instance Napkin.Run.PGCommon.HasPostgresConn Napkin.Types.Redshift.Redshift
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Backend Napkin.Types.Redshift.Redshift
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command (Napkin.Types.Commands.CreateTableAs Napkin.Types.Redshift.TableMeta) GHC.Int.Int64 Napkin.Types.Redshift.Redshift
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command (Napkin.Types.Commands.CreateTableAs ()) GHC.Int.Int64 Napkin.Types.Redshift.Redshift
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command Napkin.Types.Commands.DropTable GHC.Int.Int64 Napkin.Types.Redshift.Redshift
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command Napkin.Types.Commands.CreateViewAs GHC.Int.Int64 Napkin.Types.Redshift.Redshift
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command Napkin.Types.Commands.DropView GHC.Int.Int64 Napkin.Types.Redshift.Redshift
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command Napkin.Types.Commands.RenameTable GHC.Int.Int64 Napkin.Types.Redshift.Redshift
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command Napkin.Types.Commands.InsertIntoQuery GHC.Int.Int64 Napkin.Types.Redshift.Redshift
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command Napkin.Types.Commands.DeleteFrom GHC.Int.Int64 Napkin.Types.Redshift.Redshift
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command Napkin.Types.Commands.CheckTableExists GHC.Types.Bool Napkin.Types.Redshift.Redshift
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command Napkin.Types.Commands.GetRelationSchema (SqlSchema.Types.Schema.Fields SqlSchema.Types.Field.Field) Napkin.Types.Redshift.Redshift
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command Napkin.Types.Commands.Grant.Grant GHC.Int.Int64 Napkin.Types.Redshift.Redshift

module Napkin.Run.Postgres
withPostgresString :: String -> (BackendConn Postgres -> IO b) -> IO b
instance Napkin.Run.PGCommon.HasPostgresConn Napkin.Types.Postgres.Postgres
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Backend Napkin.Types.Postgres.Postgres
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command (Napkin.Types.Commands.CreateTableAs ()) GHC.Int.Int64 Napkin.Types.Postgres.Postgres
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command Napkin.Types.Commands.RenameTable GHC.Int.Int64 Napkin.Types.Postgres.Postgres
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command Napkin.Types.Commands.DropTable GHC.Int.Int64 Napkin.Types.Postgres.Postgres
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command Napkin.Types.Commands.CreateViewAs GHC.Int.Int64 Napkin.Types.Postgres.Postgres
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command Napkin.Types.Commands.DropView GHC.Int.Int64 Napkin.Types.Postgres.Postgres
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command Napkin.Types.Commands.InsertIntoQuery GHC.Int.Int64 Napkin.Types.Postgres.Postgres
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command Napkin.Types.Commands.DeleteFrom GHC.Int.Int64 Napkin.Types.Postgres.Postgres
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command Napkin.Types.Commands.CheckTableExists GHC.Types.Bool Napkin.Types.Postgres.Postgres
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command Napkin.Types.Commands.GetRelationSchema (SqlSchema.Types.Schema.Fields SqlSchema.Types.Field.Field) Napkin.Types.Postgres.Postgres
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command Napkin.Types.Commands.Grant.Grant GHC.Int.Int64 Napkin.Types.Postgres.Postgres


-- | Single point of entry for using napkin with the Redshift backend.
module Napkin.Backends.Redshift


-- | Single point of entry for using napkin with the Postgres backend.
module Napkin.Backends.Postgres

module Napkin.Run.BigQuery
data BigQueryRunError
ProtoErrors :: !NonEmpty ErrorProto -> BigQueryRunError
MissingDatasetId :: BigQueryRunError
MissingProjectId :: BigQueryRunError
mkBigQueryEnv :: (MonadCatch m, Katip m) => Maybe FilePath -> BQProjectId -> Maybe BQDatasetId -> HashMap Text Text -> m (BackendConn BigQuery)

-- | Make a BigQuery env but with control over configuring how the Google
--   environment is set up. You should usually call <tt>mkGoogleEnv</tt>
--   and then <a>fmap</a> some customization over it.
mkBigQueryEnv' :: (MonadCatch m, MonadIO m) => IO GoogleEnv -> BQProjectId -> Maybe BQDatasetId -> HashMap Text Text -> m (BackendConn BigQuery)
data family BackendConn b
exportTable :: (Katip m, MonadQueryStats m) => Pool GoogleEnv -> BQProjectId -> BQDatasetId -> BQTableId -> GCSBucket -> GCSKey -> m Job
downloadGCSFile :: (MonadIO m, MonadUnliftIO m) => Pool GoogleEnv -> GCSBucket -> GCSKey -> FilePath -> m ()
uploadFileToGCS :: (MonadIO m, MonadUnliftIO m) => Pool GoogleEnv -> GCSBucket -> GCSKey -> FilePath -> Maybe MediaType -> m ()
getGCSFilePermissions :: MonadIO m => Pool GoogleEnv -> GCSBucket -> GCSKey -> m [(GCSACLEntity, GCSACLRole)]
setGCSPermissionsForEntity :: MonadUnliftIO m => Pool GoogleEnv -> GCSBucket -> GCSKey -> GCSACLEntity -> GCSACLRole -> m ()

-- | segs are [project[dataset]]table. Usually combines with default
--   dataset id and project id to fully resolve Refs.
decomposeRef :: Ref Table -> (Maybe BQProjectId, Maybe BQDatasetId, BQTableId)
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Run.BigQuery.BigQueryRunError
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Run.BigQuery.BigQueryRunError
instance GHC.Exception.Type.Exception Napkin.Run.BigQuery.BigQueryRunError
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Backend Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BigQuery
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command (Napkin.Types.Commands.CreateTableAs ()) Network.Google.BigQuery.Types.Product.Job Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BigQuery
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command (Napkin.Types.Commands.CreateTableAs Napkin.Types.BigQuery.TableMeta) Network.Google.BigQuery.Types.Product.Job Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BigQuery
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command Napkin.Types.Commands.DropTable () Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BigQuery
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command Napkin.Types.Commands.DropView () Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BigQuery
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command Napkin.Types.Commands.CopyTable () Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BigQuery
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command Napkin.Types.Commands.CheckTableExists GHC.Types.Bool Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BigQuery
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command Napkin.Types.Commands.CreateViewAs Network.Google.BigQuery.Types.Product.Table Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BigQuery
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command Napkin.Types.Commands.InsertIntoQuery Network.Google.BigQuery.Types.Product.Job Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BigQuery
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command Napkin.Types.Commands.DeleteFrom Network.Google.BigQuery.Types.Product.Job Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BigQuery
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command Napkin.Types.Commands.GetRelationSchema (SqlSchema.Types.Schema.Fields SqlSchema.Types.Field.Field) Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BigQuery
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command Napkin.Types.Commands.Grant.Grant () Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BigQuery
instance Napkin.Run.Base.Command Napkin.Types.Commands.RenameTable () Napkin.Types.BigQuery.BigQuery


-- | Single point of entry for using napkin with the BigQuery backend.
module Napkin.Backends.BigQuery

module Napkin.Cli.Auth.CmdRunner
asBigQuery :: MonadIO m => Text -> ExceptT AuthEvalError m BigQuery

-- | reset oAuth cached file
work :: (MonadIO m, MonadCatch m) => AuthCommandOptions -> ExceptT AuthEvalError m ()


-- | Single point of entry for using napkin OAuth
module Napkin.Auth.OAuth

module Napkin.Run.Assertions
assertRowCountsWithin :: (Katip m, MonadFail m, Backend b, MonadQueryStats m, RenderSql Query b) => BackendConn b -> String -> Double -> Relation -> Relation -> m ()

-- | todo: how to make this work both for ints and doubles?
assertAnswersWithin :: (Katip m, MonadFail m, Backend b, RenderSql q1 b, RenderSql q2 b, MonadQueryStats m) => BackendConn b -> String -> Double -> q1 -> q2 -> m ()
assertUniqueBy :: (RenderSql Query b, Backend b, Katip m, MonadFail m, MonadQueryStats m) => Relation -> [Ref a] -> String -> BackendConn b -> m ()

-- | Like <tt>assertUniqeBy</tt> but can express multiple cases on same
--   table
assertUniquesBy :: (Katip m, MonadFail m, Backend b, RenderSql Query b, MonadQueryStats m) => Ref a1 -> [(SExp, [Ref a])] -> String -> BackendConn b -> m ()
assertUniqueByCap :: (Katip m, MonadFail m, Backend b, RenderSql Query b, MonadQueryStats m) => Double -> Relation -> [Ref a] -> String -> BackendConn b -> m ()

module Napkin.Cli.Run.Parser
runParser :: Parser RunCommandOptions

-- | Used solely for BigQuery URLs- postgresql URLs are passed through
--   directly.
parseConnectionURL :: String -> Either String URI

module Napkin.Utils.FileSystem
isSymlinkValid :: MonadIO m => FilePath -> m Bool
isSymlink :: MonadIO m => FilePath -> m Bool

module Napkin.Cli.Eval.Dependencies
findGhcPackageDbs :: (MonadIO m, MonadThrow m) => m [PackageDbPath]
newtype PackageDbPath
PackageDbPath :: FilePath -> PackageDbPath
[_unPackageDbPath] :: PackageDbPath -> FilePath
pkgDbDir :: PackageDbPath -> FilePath
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Cli.Eval.Dependencies.PackageDbPath
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Cli.Eval.Dependencies.PackageDbPath
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Cli.Eval.Dependencies.GhcVersionIsNotDetectedEx
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Cli.Eval.Dependencies.GhcVersionIsNotDetectedEx
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Cli.Eval.Dependencies.GhcVersionIsAmbigousEx
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Cli.Eval.Dependencies.GhcVersionIsAmbigousEx
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Cli.Eval.Dependencies.DerivationPath
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Cli.Eval.Dependencies.DerivationPath
instance GHC.Exception.Type.Exception Napkin.Cli.Eval.Dependencies.GhcVersionIsAmbigousEx
instance GHC.Exception.Type.Exception Napkin.Cli.Eval.Dependencies.GhcVersionIsNotDetectedEx


-- | This module should be seen as an interpreter that takes the YAML
--   version of a spec and converts it to a proper, fully typed Spec value.
--   
--   In a sense, it's also a bit of a typechecker: YAML versions are
--   necessarily dynamically typed and there's the possibility of type
--   mismatches.
module Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Interpret
data YamlInterpretError
YamlInterpretError_MismatchingBacked :: YamlBackend -> YamlBackend -> YamlInterpretError
YamlInterpretError_MismatchingTableMeta :: YamlTableMeta -> YamlInterpretError
YamlInterpretError_ParseError :: ParseException -> YamlInterpretError
loadYaml :: ByteString -> Either YamlInterpretError YamlSpec

-- | Validate that caller's desired backend matches against what was
--   specified in the YAML file.
interpretBackend :: forall b m. (ReifiesBackend b, ToYamlBackend b, Monad m) => YamlBackend -> ExceptT YamlInterpretError m ()

-- | The main entry point interpreting a given YAML spec file as a
--   <tt>Spec</tt> value ready to run via <tt>executeSpec</tt>
--   
--   This function is intended to unroll/interpet as much as possible to
--   get the spec in its final state ready to be actually run.
interpretYamlToSpec :: forall bk t1 t2 t3 t4. (ReifiesBackend bk, ToYamlBackend bk, Typeable bk, Command (CreateTableAs (BackendTableMeta bk)) t1 bk, Command CheckTableExists Bool bk, Command InsertIntoQuery t1 bk, Command DeleteFrom t2 bk, Command DropTable t3 bk, Command RenameTable t4 bk, Drop (CreateTableAs (BackendTableMeta bk)) DropTable, RenderSql SExp bk, ParseSQL bk, Default (BackendTableMeta bk), Typeable (BackendTableMeta bk)) => FilePath -> YamlSpec -> bk -> [FilePath] -> ExceptT YamlInterpretError (Spec bk) ()

-- | Main entry point for fully interpreting a given table's entry in the
--   YAML file.
interpretTable :: forall bk t1 t2 t3 t4. (Typeable (BackendTableMeta bk), Command (CreateTableAs (BackendTableMeta bk)) t1 bk, Command CheckTableExists Bool bk, Command InsertIntoQuery t1 bk, Command DeleteFrom t2 bk, Command DropTable t3 bk, Command RenameTable t4 bk, Drop (CreateTableAs (BackendTableMeta bk)) DropTable, RenderSql SExp bk, Default (BackendTableMeta bk), ParseSQL bk, ReifiesBackend bk) => YamlBackend -> FilePath -> FilePath -> [String] -> [FilePath] -> YamlTableSpec -> ExceptT YamlInterpretError (Spec bk) ()

-- | Parse backend-specific table meta content from YAML file into the type
--   dictated by the particular backend.
interpretTableMeta :: forall bk m. (Monad m, Typeable (BackendTableMeta bk)) => YamlTableMeta -> ExceptT YamlInterpretError m (Maybe (BackendTableMeta bk))
interpretHook :: YamlHook -> Hook bk
interpretAction :: forall bk m t1 t2 t3 t4. (Monad m, MonadIO m, Typeable (BackendTableMeta bk), Command (CreateTableAs (BackendTableMeta bk)) t1 bk, Command CheckTableExists Bool bk, Command InsertIntoQuery t1 bk, Command DeleteFrom t2 bk, Command DropTable t3 bk, Command RenameTable t4 bk, Drop (CreateTableAs (BackendTableMeta bk)) DropTable, RenderSql SExp bk, Default (BackendTableMeta bk), ParseSQL bk, ReifiesBackend bk) => YamlBackend -> Maybe (BackendTableMeta bk) -> Ref Table -> FilePath -> FilePath -> [String] -> [FilePath] -> YamlCreateAction -> ExceptT YamlInterpretError m (CreateAction bk)
yamlSpecTarget :: YamlSpecTarget -> SpecTarget
interpretSpec :: forall bk t1 t2 t3 t4. (Typeable (BackendTableMeta bk), Typeable bk, Command (CreateTableAs (BackendTableMeta bk)) t1 bk, Command CheckTableExists Bool bk, Command InsertIntoQuery t1 bk, Command DeleteFrom t2 bk, Command DropTable t3 bk, Command RenameTable t4 bk, Drop (CreateTableAs (BackendTableMeta bk)) DropTable, RenderSql SExp bk, Default (BackendTableMeta bk), ParseSQL bk, ReifiesBackend bk) => YamlBackend -> FilePath -> FilePath -> [String] -> [FilePath] -> YamlHaskellSymbol -> ExceptT YamlInterpretError (Spec bk) ()
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Spec.Yaml.Interpret.YamlInterpretError

module Napkin.Cli.Repl.CmdRunner

-- | Repl processing Invokes Napkin ghci repl
work :: (MonadIO m, MonadCatch m) => ReplCommandOptions -> ExceptT ReplEvalError m ()
joinPath' :: FilePath -> FilePath -> FilePath
packagedbsM :: (MonadIO m, MonadCatch m) => m [String]

module Napkin.Cli.Commands
data NapCommand

-- | Napkin release version
NapCommand_ShowVersion :: NapCommand
NapCommand_InitCommand :: InitFromTemplate -> NapCommand
NapCommand_ListEmbeddedTemplates :: NapCommand

-- | path to YAML spec file
NapCommand_Run :: RunCommandOptions -> NapCommand

-- | path to SQL directory from which to generate a YAML file
NapCommand_Generate :: GenerateCommandOptions -> NapCommand
NapCommand_EvalHaskellFunction :: EvalHaskellFunCmd -> NapCommand
NapCommand_Dump :: DumpCommandOptions -> NapCommand
NapCommand_PrintAstForSqlFile :: SqlBackend -> FilePath -> NapCommand
NapCommand_FindUnusedCteColumns :: SqlBackend -> FilePath -> NapCommand
NapCommand_OptimizeSpec :: OptimizeSpecOptions -> NapCommand

-- | Auth and OAuth Command Line Options
NapCommand_Auth :: AuthCommandOptions -> NapCommand
NapCommand_Validate :: ValidateCommandOptions -> NapCommand

-- | Repl Command Line Options
NapCommand_Repl :: ReplCommandOptions -> NapCommand

-- | Open browser page with Napkin Haddock
NapCommand_Haddock_Online :: NapCommand

-- | Open browser page with Napkin Docs
NapCommand_Docs :: NapCommand
data SqlBackend
BigQueryBackend :: SqlBackend
PostgresqlBackend :: SqlBackend
RedshiftBackend :: SqlBackend
newtype VerboseCmd
VerboseCmd :: Bool -> VerboseCmd
data GlobalCommand
GlobalCommand :: VerboseCmd -> NapCommand -> GlobalCommand
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Napkin.Cli.Commands.SqlBackend
instance GHC.Read.Read Napkin.Cli.Commands.SqlBackend
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Cli.Commands.SqlBackend
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Cli.Commands.SqlBackend
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Cli.Commands.NapCommand
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Cli.Commands.NapCommand
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Cli.Commands.VerboseCmd
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Cli.Commands.VerboseCmd
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Cli.Commands.GlobalCommand
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Cli.Commands.GlobalCommand

module Napkin.Cli.Parser
napCommandParser :: Parser NapCommand
globalCommandParser :: Parser GlobalCommand
parseGlobalCommand :: IO GlobalCommand

module Napkin.Cli.CmdRunner
napkinVersion :: String
napkinBuildTime :: String
napkinGitHash :: String
runNapCommand :: (MonadIO m, MonadCatch m) => NapCommand -> m ExitCode

-- | Convert the new napkin CLI options to the legacy structure.
convertCliRunOpts :: RunCommandOptions -> RunOptions
data SupportedBackend
Bk_Postgres :: SupportedBackend
Bk_BigQuery :: SupportedBackend
Bk_Redshift :: SupportedBackend
backendForConnectionURL :: Maybe String -> SupportedBackend
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Napkin.Cli.CmdRunner.SupportedBackend
instance GHC.Show.Show Napkin.Cli.CmdRunner.SupportedBackend
